(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Social Media Engagement Assistant
description:
About IVO:



IVO (Interval Virtual Outreach) is a social media engagement agency servicing real estate professionals across the U.S. We help agents and lenders grow their visibility by showing up consistently in their professional networks — through thoughtful likes, comments, and story reactions every weekday.



As an IVO VA, you are not just scheduling posts. You are the daily presence of a real estate brand. Every comment you write reflects a professional's reputation, and the relationships you build on their behalf are real.



---



This Role at a Glance:



- Hours: 2–4 hours per day

- Schedule: Monday–Friday

- Clients: 1 dedicated client per VA

- Weekly target: 100–200 engagements

- Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



---



What You'll Do:



- Log in daily via a US-based VPN to manage your assigned client's
 and Instagram accounts (and additional platforms if subscribed)

- Review your client's target contact list each session and prioritize 20–50 profiles to engage based on recent activity

- Like relevant posts and scan stories from the past 24–48 hours, focusing on real estate content and professional milestones

- Use Grok AI to draft 2–3 comment options per post, then personalize and post one — always a short, genuine question that invites a reply

- React to stories with emojis or brief replies where appropriate, and post personalized birthday and work anniversary congratulations if the client subscribes to that add-on

- Flag all incoming direct messages in the client dashboard for the client to handle — you never respond to DMs

- Log all activity (comments, likes, profiles engaged, conversations sparked) in the daily metrics spreadsheet after every session

- Participate in monthly team quality reviews and quarterly refresher training



---



What We're Looking For:



- Strong written English — comments must sound natural and human; grammar, tone, and clarity matter every time

- Reliable internet and device — stable connection, modern browser, and availability Mon–Fri during agreed hours

- Attention to detail — brand guidelines, engagement limits, and platform rules must be followed precisely every session

- Discretion — you'll have access to real client accounts; credential security and confidentiality are non-negotiable

- Comfort with AI tools — you'll use Grok daily to draft comments; no prior experience needed, just willingness to learn the workflow

- Consistency — your client's visibility depends on you showing up every weekday; reliability is the most important trait we hire for



---



Important Policies:



- VPN required, always. Every session must be conducted through our designated US-based VPN. Logging in to a client account without an active VPN is a compliance violation.

- No DM responses. You will never reply to or send direct messages on behalf of a client. DMs are flagged for the client to handle personally.

- No copy-paste from AI. Grok gives you options — you always personalize before posting. A comment that sounds like a robot reflects on the client.

- Engagement limits apply. You'll engage each contact a maximum of 5–10 times per week to stay within platform guidelines and avoid spam flags.



---



Training & Support:



You won't be dropped in and left to figure it out. Before your first live session, you'll complete a full SOP walkthrough, a 1-hour Grok training session, and a supervised practice engagement. Monthly quality reviews, quarterly refresher training, and an open escalation line to our ops team are ongoing throughout your time at IVO.



---



How to Apply:



Send the following to [YOUR
]:



1. A brief introduction — who you are and why this role interests you

2. Your availability (timezone and daily hours)

3. A short writing sample: write one engagement comment for three example posts (2–3 sentences max each, question-based):

   - An agent just posted about earning a new real estate certification

   - A lender shared a market update about rising interest rates in Austin

   - A realtor celebrated closing their 50th deal



Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Philippines-based applicants only.



---

title: Medical Payment Posting & Verification Specialist
description:
About Us

OCD Anxiety Centers is a dynamic and forward-thinking mental health organization dedicated to empowering individuals through positivity, proactivity, and growth. We are committed to building high-performing, collaborative teams that prioritize both excellence and human connection. As we continue to grow, we are expanding our offshore support team and creating opportunities for individuals who are detail-oriented, adaptable, and eager to contribute to a more integrated and people-centered work environment.



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and adaptable Medical Payment Posting & Verification Specialist to support our growing revenue cycle operations. This role will begin on a PRN (as-needed/project-based) basis, with the opportunity to transition into part-time and eventually full-time employment based on performance, business needs, and team integration.

This position supports payment posting, verification of benefits, and denial-related workflows, while also playing a key role in fostering a collaborative, cross-trained, and non-siloed team environment. The ideal candidate values both accuracy and teamwork, and is eager to grow within a flexible and evolving role.



Key Responsibilities

Payment Posting

Accurately post insurance and patient payments in Lightning Step

Reconcile payments with EOBs (Explanation of Benefits) and ERAs

Identify and flag discrepancies, underpayments, and unapplied payments

Ensure all posting is completed with a high level of accuracy and timeliness



Verification of Benefits (VOB)

Verify patient insurance eligibility, coverage, and benefits

Document co-pays, deductibles, out-of-pocket maximums, and authorization requirements

Ensure complete and accurate benefit information prior to billing



Denial & Revenue Support

Assist in identifying and working basic denials

Escalate complex issues as needed

Support clean claim processes by identifying trends or recurring issues



Cross-Training & Collaboration

Actively participate in cross-training across multiple revenue cycle functions

Collaborate with tea
mbers to reduce operational silos

Contribute to a communicative, engaged, and team-oriented environment

Participate in team discussions and continuous process improvement efforts



Work Structure & Growth Path

Phase 1 (PRN / Project-Based): ~4 hours per day, flexible based on workload

Phase 2 (Part-Time): Increased hours as responsibilities expand

Phase 3 (Full-Time): Transition based on performance, reliability, and business needs



Required Qualifications

Experience in medical payment posting and/or insurance verification

Strong understanding of EOBs, ERAs, and insurance workflows

Familiarity with revenue cycle processes

Experience with EHR/EMR systems (Lightning Step preferred or similar platforms)

Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

High level of accuracy and attention to detail, especially with numbers

Strong organizational and time management skills

Ability to work independently in a remote/offshore environment



Preferred Qualifications

Experience in behavioral health or mental health billing

Exposure to denial management workflows

Experience in cross-functional or flexible roles

Comfortable working in a growing and evolving environment



Key Competencies

Analytical Thinking: Ability to interpret financial and insurance data accurately

Adaptability: Willingness to learn multiple functions and grow within the role

Communication: Clear, proactive, and collaborative communication style

Accountability: Takes ownership of tasks and delivers consistent results

Team Mindset: Values connection, engagement, and contributing to a cohesive team



What Success Looks Like

Accurate and timely payment posting with minimal errors

Thorough and reliable insurance verifications

Active participation in cross-training and team collaboration

Ability to grow into expanded responsibilities over time

Contribution to a more integrated, less siloed team environment



Additional Notes

This role is ideal for someone looking for growth and long-term opportunity, while starting in a flexible capacity. We are intentionally building a scalable and collaborative offshore team, and we value individuals who want to be part of that journey.

title: ISA/ Top Sales Rep Performer Wanted
description:
Part-Time Cold Calling Sales Rep / Real Estate (Land)



3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.

title: Head of Product Operations & AI Enablement
description:
**Head of Product Operations & AI Enablement**



We’re looking for a high-leverage operator to work directly with the founder to scale how our product is communicated, understood, and improved—both internally and externally. You will work directly with the founder. 



This role sits at the center of product, engineering, marketing, and customer teams. You’ll own product communication, documentation, and release coordination, while also building AI-powered workflows and agents to reduce manual work and help us scale efficiently.



**What you’ll do**



* Own product communication (release notes, announcements, internal updates)

* Maintain and improve help docs, guides, and product education (including videos)

* Ensure app store listings, website, and marketing stay aligned with the product

* Keep sales, CS, and support teams up to date and enabled on product changes

* Act as the connective layer between founder, engineering, and go-to-market teams

* Build and deploy AI agents/workflows to improve support, onboarding, and internal operations



**What we’re looking for**



* Strong operator with excellent writing and communication skills

* Product-minded, highly organized, and proactive

* Comfortable working cross-functionally with technical and non-technical teams

* Hands-on with AI tools (prompting, automation, agents) and excited to build

* Bias for action and ownership—someone who gets things done without being asked twice



You’ll help turn product decisions into clear execution across the company—and use AI to multiply our team’s effectiveness.

title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER & VIDEO EDITOR — AI-Powered — In-house · Full-time · Remote
description:
Summary

We run a portfolio of DTC supplement brands across Europe, USA, and Australia. We produce high volumes of performance creatives daily — static ads, UGC-style videos, advertorial visuals, product creatives.



We're looking for a designer and video editor who uses AI tools at a professional level to produce fast, high-quality output without sacrificing quality.



This is not a creative director role. This is an execution role.



You receive briefs. You produce assets. You move fast.



What you'll be doing:



Producing static ad creatives from briefs — multiple variations per day

Editing and animating UGC video footage into platform-ready ads

Using AI tools to generate, enhance, and animate visuals at speed

Working across 6+ brands simultaneously with different visual identities

Delivering production-ready assets directly into our workflow

You must have:



Strong proficiency in Higgsfield, Kling, Sora, or similar AI video generation tools

Canva Pro — advanced level

Video editing experience — CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

Experience producing performance ads — not brand content, not organic posts

Ability to produce multiple assets per day without quality dropping

Attention to detail — wrong brand name, wrong color, wrong format = unacceptable

Fast turnaround — briefs come in, assets go out same day or next day

What we offer:



Performance-based compensation

Remote, async-friendly operation

Clear briefs — you execute, you don't guess

Real volume — you will never run out of work

Path to Senior Creative Producer for the right person

To apply:



Record a 3–5 minute video answering:



Your name, current role, and how long you've been producing performance creatives

Which AI tools you use daily and at what level — show us, don't just tell us

Walk us through one ad creative you produced — what was the brief, what did you make, what were the results

How do you manage high volume output without losing quality

What does your daily workflow look like when you have 10+ assets to deliver

Also share:



Portfolio of performance ad creatives you've produced

Examples of AI-generated or AI-enhanced video work

Any metrics from creatives you've produced — CTR, hook rate, ROAS

Upload everything to Google Drive or Loom and reply with the links.



Deadline: 48 hours



Only candidates who complete this step will move forward.

title: Funding Manager (C-Suite Track) — High-Growth Financial Services Company
description:
About Us

Zero Interest Mastery is one of the fastest-growing business funding companies in the country.

We help entrepreneurs and real estate investors access $50K–$150K+ in funding through:

- 0% Business Credit Cards

- Personal Loans

- Business Lines of Credit

- HELOCs

We’ve funded $100M+ for 1,000+ clients, and we’re now scaling aggressively.

Our next move: 3X growth in the next 5 months

To do that, we need a Funding Manager who can build, lead, and optimize at a high level.



The Role

You will oversee three funding pods responsible for executing our Done-For-You funding model.

Each pod includes:

- Funding Strategists- build gameplans

- Processors- apply for cards for clients

- Client-Facing Account Managers

You are responsible for:

- Performance of the entire funding department

- Speed, quality, and outcomes of funding execution

- KPIs, reporting, and accountability systems

- Coaching, correcting, and elevating team performance

This is not a passive management role.

- This is a builder + operator role with a direct path into the C-suite.



What You’ll Own

1. Department Performance

Total funding volume (monthly + per pod)

Time to funding (goal:  perfection

Ownership > excuses

Results > activity

If you thrive in that environment, this is a career-defining opportunity.





HOW TO APPLY

title: OPERATIONS SUPERVISOR – TOURISM & HOSPITALITY – EL NIDO
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a fast-growing travel and expedition company based in El Nido, Palawan, operating daily tours, private expeditions, and multi-day experiences for international clients.



Our operations involve boats, drivers, guides, logistics teams, and multiple on-site partners, across El Nido, Coron, and Puerto Princesa.



We are now looking for a hands-on Operations Supervisor to support daily field operations — someone who can be on the ground, coordinate teams, ensure standards are followed, and help solve day-to-day operational issues.



This is not a remote role. This is a field-based position.



OPERATIONS SUPERVISOR – TOURISM & HOSPITALITY – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)



(Assistant Operations Manager / Field Coordinator)



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Be present on the ground to support daily operations across tours, logistics, and field teams (boats, drivers, guides, coordination staff)

• Ensure bookings are correctly executed and that guests receive the expected service

• Coordinate between teams (sales, operations, guides, suppliers) to avoid miscommunication and delays

• Monitor daily operations and flag issues early (delays, missing information, coordination problems)

• Ensure SOPs and service standards are followed consistently by all tea
mbers

• Support team leaders and help maintain discipline and accountability on the ground

• Assist in resolving operational issues (guest complaints, schedule changes, supplier issues)

• Track and report operational inconsistencies (booking errors, missing data, delays, etc.)

• Help improve processes and workflows as operations grow



WHAT YOU BRING



• 2–5 years experience in tourism, hospitality, or service operations (resorts, hotels, tour operators, transport/logistics, etc.)

• Experience working in on-site operations (not purely remote roles)

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, hands-on environment

• Strong sense of responsibility and attention to detail

• Good communication skills and ability to coordinate between teams

• Able to follow and enforce basic procedures and standards

• Fluent in English and comfortable interacting with international clients

• Willing to be based in El Nido and travel when needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role is for someone who is:



• Hands-on and field-oriented

• Reliable and consistent in execution

• Observant and detail-focused

• Comfortable working with people on the ground

• Proactive in identifying and reporting issues

• Willing to learn and grow into a larger operations role over time



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Standards matter.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:



If you were responsible for supporting daily operations in a travel company, what types of issues or problems would you watch for?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



IMPORTANT



• This role is based in El Nido, Palawan

• This is not a remote position

• Experience in tourism, hospitality, or on-site operations is required

• Candidates without relevant on-site experience will not be considered



WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT



• Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing travel company

• Hands-on role with real operational impact

• Possibility to grow into a more senior operations position

• Work in one of the most beautiful locations in the Philippines

• International environment with diverse clients



LOCATION



El Nido, Palawan

Regular travel to Coron and Puerto Princesa

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Real Estate Team
description:
Location: Remote

Reports To: Sales Manager / Team Lead

Type: Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Bonus



Job Summary:

We are looking for a proactive and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing real estate team. The SDR will play a key role in generating new business opportunities by engaging potential clients, nurturing leads, and setting qualified appointments for our agent team. This position is ideal for someone who is organized, persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, goal-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities:

-  Prospect and qualify leads through phone calls, text,
, and CRM outreach.

-  Respond promptly to inbound inquiries from online platforms, social media, or marketing campaigns.

-  Conduct initial needs assessments to understand buyers’ or sellers’ timelines, goals, and motivation.

-  Schedule listing or buyer consultation appointments for senior agents.

-  Maintain accurate records of leads and activity in the team CRM (e.g., Salesforce).

-  Collaborate closely with the marketing and operations teams to optimize lead conversion.

-  Track daily activity metrics — calls, texts,
s, appointments set, and conversion rates.

-  Follow up with past clients, warm leads, and sphere contacts to generate repeat and referral business.

-  Continuously learn about new construction communities, local market trends, and loan products to better engage prospects.



Qualifications:

-  Strong communication and interpersonal skills — comfortable engaging with potential clients over the phone and online.

-  Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple lead sources simultaneously.

-  Prior experience in real estate sales, inside sales, customer service, or telemarketing preferred.

-  Familiarity with real estate CRM systems and marketing automation tools is a plus.

-  Goal-oriented with a strong sense of accountability and urgency.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

-  Qualified appointments set per week/month.

-  Lead-to-appointment conversion rate.

-  Response time to inbound leads. 

-  Follow-up consistency and pipeline activity.

-  Contribution to overall team closings.

Join Us!

At Axis Homes Realty LLC, we value teamwork, growth, and a client-first mindset. Joining our tea
ans being part of a supportive and collaborative environment where your contributions make a real impact. If you’re passionate about real estate operations and ready to grow your career with a company that values excellence and integrity, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Real Estate Growth Specialist (Hybrid ISA + Transaction Coordinator)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Florida Time)

Pay: $300 USD Base + Aggressive Commissions ($1,200+ OTE)



About the Role:

Beach House TC Services is a high-end real estate support firm specializing in the new 2026 FinCEN Compliance standards for Florida transactions. We are looking for a "Rockstar" who can serve as our initial Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to build our client base and transition into a Lead Transaction Coordinator as we scale.



This is a Hybrid role: You will hunt for new business in the morning and manage the "Contract-to-Close" workflow in the afternoon.



Key Responsibilities:



Outbound Prospecting (ISA): Call and
 Florida-based real estate agents and brokerages to pitch our specialized, FinCEN-compliant TC services.



Account Acquisition: Secure signed Service Agreements from new agent clients.



Transaction Coordination (TC): Manage the full escrow process from contract to close, including opening title, tracking deadlines, and assembling compliance files.



FinCEN Compliance: Assist agents in gathering Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) and documentation for all-cash residential transfers as required by the March 2026 rules.



Compensation & Growth:



Starting Base: $300 USD / month.



Sign-on Bonus: $50 for every new Agent/Brokerage you sign to our service.



Closing Bonus: $25 for every successfully funded transaction.



Milestone Raise: Automatic base salary increase to $400 after your first 5 signed clients, with a path to $600+ as the Lead VA.



On-Target Earnings: An average performer should earn $1,200 - $1,500 USD per month.



Requirements:



Experience: 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate ISA or TC for a US-based team (Florida experience is a massive plus).



Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English. You must be comfortable and confident on the phone with US agents.



Knowledge: Familiarity with Florida FAR/BAR contracts and transaction management software (Skyslope, Dotloop, or similar).



Tech: Reliable high-speed internet, noise-canceling headset, and a quiet workspace.



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and a voice recording (approx. 60 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why you are the best fit for a "Growth" role. Mention the word "Beach" in your subject line so we know you read the full post.

Availability

title: AI Chat Monitor & Sales Support Specialist
description:
Are you a highly experienced, discreet, and professional customer service expert looking for a unique, flexible role where integrity and autonomy are paramount?



We are seeking an exceptional individual to join our team as an AI Chat Monitor & Sales Support Specialist. You will be the critical human interface for our high-value clientele and their customers in Australia and internationally, ensuring seamless service and successful sales.



A Unique Work Structure

This role offers a flexible and highly autonomous structure, ideal for someone seeking to manage their own time and workload:



Work Schedule: 7 days per week, with a 10-hour commitment window each day.



Actual Workload: Initially, you will be required to work only 2–3 hours per day on active monitoring, intervention, and sales finalization. The remaining hours in your 10-hour window are available for you to manage your own time, with the expectation that you remain accessible for urgent interventions.



Growth Potential: The required workload and active hours are expected to increase over time as the business and client base expands.



About the Role

In this pivotal position, you will be the crucial human element, responsible for:



Monitoring our AI Customer Service Chatbot: Actively observing chat interactions during your 10-hour window to ensure the bot is providing accurate and helpful information.



Strategic Intervention: Stepping in quickly and professionally to take over conversations from the AI, specifically when a client is ready to finalize a sale, book a complex service, or requires sensitive, bespoke assistance.



Sales Finalization: Utilizing your extensive sales and customer service skills to smoothly and professionally complete high-value transactions, ensuring client satisfaction and securing the deal.



Upholding Professionalism & Integrity: Maintaining the utmost confidentiality and discretion when dealing with sensitive business details and client information for our Clients.



About You

We are seeking a highly experienced customer service professional who can demonstrate:



Extensive Experience: A proven track record of success in high-level customer service, sales, or account management, preferably dealing with high-value or executive clientele.



Exceptional Autonomy: The proven ability to manage time effectively within the required 10-hour window, work independently, and take full ownership of your role and its outcomes.



Impeccable Professionalism and Integrity: A non-judgmental, discreet, and highly ethical approach to all interactions. Confidentiality is paramount.



Advanced Communication Skills: Superior written communication skills for clear, concise, and persuasive chat interactions.



What We Offer

A challenging, rewarding, and unique role.



A flexible work structure that offers initial reduced workload with guaranteed future growth.



A supportive, professional, and results-oriented environment.



Salary commensurate with experience and demonstrated ability.

title: Transaction Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)
description:
Transaction Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)



Role Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized Transaction Coordinator (Virtual Assistant) to join our high-performing real estate team. In this role, you will manage residential real estate transactions from the time a purchase agreement is signed through closing. Working remotely, you will coordinate all the details and paperwork involved in each deal, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks. You will work closely with agents, clients, and third-party service providers (title companies, lenders, inspectors, etc.) to keep transactions on schedule and resolve any issues that arise. This is a fast-paced position that demands excellent communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to delivering smooth, error-free closings for our clients.



Who We Are & What to Expect:

We are a high-performing real estate team committed to accuracy, urgency, and world-class service. As a Transaction Coordinator supporting our operations, you will be immersed in a fast-paced, high-volume environment where precision and communication are essential. On average:



- Our organization closes approximately 75 transaction files per month, supporting both buyer and seller sides.

- A single Transaction Coordinator typically manages 25-40 active files at any given time.

- The team handles 50–100+
s daily on average, with peak days reaching 200+
s, particularly during high season or end-of-month cycles.





Key Responsibilities:

-Manage Transactions from Contract to Close: Oversee all administrative aspects of real estate transactions (both buyer and seller sides) from the executed purchase agreement through closing.

-Liaison & Communication: Serve as the primary point of contact for all parties involved in the transaction – including agents, clients, title/escrow officers, lenders, and inspectors.

-Documentation & Compliance: Prepare and review all transaction documents for completeness and accuracy.

-Deadline Tracking: Monitor and track all important contract dates and contingency deadlines.

-Scheduling & Coordination: Coordinate the scheduling of inspections, appraisals, final walk-throughs, and the closing appointment.

-Issue Resolution: Anticipate and identify potential issues or obstacles in a transaction.

-Closing Preparation: Double-check all closing requirements in the days leading up to closing.

-Post-Closing Tasks: Ensure final settlement statements and closing packages are archived properly.

-Team Support: Maintain up-to-date client database and assist with administrative tasks as needed.



Ideal Candidate Profile

· Experience: At least 2+ years in transaction coordination.

· High-Volume Efficiency: Comfortable handling 25-40 active transactions and high
 volumes.

· Organizational Skills: Meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational capabilities.

· Communication: Excellent written and verbal skills.

· Customer Service Mindset: Service-oriented and patient with a positive attitude.

· Tech Proficiency: Familiar with platforms like Follow Up Boss, OTC, Google Workspace, and Transaction Desk.

·  Independence & Teamwork: Self-driven but also a strong collaborator.

·  Adaptability & Excellence: Thrives in a changing environment and aims for high-quality output.



Join a team that values professionalism, growth, and the power of great systems. We pride ourselves on operational excellence and creating win-win outcomes for our clients. If you are an experienced transaction coordinator who enjoys a fast-paced environment and delivers top-notch service, we encourage you to bring your expertise to our team!



Requirement:

Must have at least two years of U.S Real Estate Transaction Management/Coordinator 

Arizona preferred 

Must have a Dual Monitor Set Up

Must have Fast and Stable Internet



$1000 per month - 60-day trial

$
per month

40 hours a week

title: Senior Manager - E-Commerce (with leadership exp)
description:
Description

We are hiring a senior E-commerce Manager to own and manage the majority of our digital business. This role is ideal for someone with a strong small business background who is comfortable leading a lean team, managing day to day operations, and stepping into the details when needed.



This is a hands on leadership role. We are not looking for a high level executive who operates far from execution. We are looking for someone who can lead, manage, and do..



Company Brief:

We are supporting a privately owned company that distributes marine dock parts and supplies, with a strong and growing e-commerce operation in Florida. The business serves both B2B and B2C customers and relies heavily on its digital channels to drive sales, support customer experience, and scale efficiently across domestic and international markets.



Responsibilities

Owning the end to end e-commerce operation across Shopify as the primary platform

Managing and supporting the back office and digital team

Overseeing technical, operational, and day to day e-commerce activities

Acting as the main point of contact for agencies and third party vendors

Representing the company on technical, operational, and integration related calls

Managing product additions, integrations, customer service escalations, and platform issues

Ensuring the team is aligned, productive, and clear on priorities

Running regular check ins and one on ones with direct reports

Coordinating with in person staff as it relates to e-commerce operations

Communicating clearly with company owners on progress, issues, and priorities

Getting hands on when needed to resolve issues or unblock the team



Platforms and Experience Required

Strong expertise in Shopify is required

Experience with Amazon is strongly preferred

Exposure to Walmart or eBay is a plus but not required

Comfort managing integrations, apps, and technical workflows

Experience working with agencies and external partners



Requirements



Education & Experience



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, E-commerce, or a related field is preferred

Minimum of 3 years of hands-on Shopify experience in a live e-commerce environment

Proven experience maintaining, optimizing, and troubleshooting Shopify stores

Experience managing or supporting marketplace platforms such as Amazon, Etsy, eBay and More

Background working in product-based or multi-channel e-commerce businesses

Strong understanding of end-to-end e-commerce operations and workflows

Comfortable working remotely and independently with minimal supervision

Able to manage day-to-day execution while overseeing team output and priorities

Ability to work fully during Eastern Standard Time business hours



Nice to Have Skills



Experience with additional marketplaces such as Walmart or other third-party platforms

Familiarity with e-commerce integrations, apps, and third-party tools

Basic understanding of e-commerce financials, including margins, pricing, and cost of goods

Experience coordinating with agencies or external vendors

Exposure to international e-commerce operations or cross-border selling

Comfortable supporting or overseeing digital marketing initiatives in partnership with specialists or agencies

Experience helping scale or integrate new brands or acquisitions into an existing e-commerce platform



Ideal Candidate Profile



Has managed a small to mid sized team (roughly 5–20 people)

Comes from a small business or growing company environment

Is comfortable wearing multiple hats

Can lead without being “too high level”

Is not afraid to get into the operational or technical details

Can grow with the company as we scale and potentially acquire other businesses

title: Part-Time Social Media Content Creator — @bikes (Instagram)
description:
About Us

We run a growing premium Instagram page in the road cycling and performance space with a global audience. Our visual identity is clean, dark, and minimal — data-driven content with high-end design. We're looking for a content creator who can handle research, design, and editing externally, delivering ready-to-post content that we publish on our end.

Important: You will not have access to the Instagram account. Your role is to create and deliver content. We handle all publishing, community management, and account access.



What You'll Do



Research and pitch 3–5 new content topics per week (cycling science, gear breakdowns, training tips, race culture) via shared doc or messaging

Create Instagram Reels — we'll send you raw footage and photos from rides, you edit them into polished Reels with captions, transitions, and trending audio

Design carousel posts and static graphics in our brand style (templates and references provided)

Write captions and hashtag sets for every piece of content, delivered alongside the visual assets

Follow a weekly content calendar and deliver all assets on schedule: 4 feed posts + 3 Reels minimum per week

Deliver all files in organised folders (Google Drive or Dropbox) — named, sized correctly for Instagram, and ready to post with no further editing needed

Request raw content from us proactively — don't wait for us to send it, tell us what you need ("I need a 15-second clip of you descending" or "send me a close-up of your tyres")

Research trending audio, formats, and competitor pages — bring ideas to a weekly 30-minute sync call

Provide a brief weekly report: what was delivered, what's planned next week, any content requests you need from us





What You Won't Do



You will not post to the account or have login access

You will not manage DMs or comments

You will not run ads or access analytics dashboards (we'll share relevant stats with you)





What We're Looking For



Strong portfolio of Instagram content you've created (Reels, carousels, stories) — link required

Proficiency in video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve)

Graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum, Figma or Photoshop preferred)

Understanding of what performs on Instagram in 2026 — you know why shares matter more than likes

Native or near-native English writing ability

Cycling knowledge is a strong plus but not required — willingness to learn the niche deeply is essential

Organised and reliable with deadlines — we need files delivered on time, every time, since we can't post what we don't have

Comfortable working asynchronously with a weekly sync call





How to Apply

Send a message with the following:



A link to your portfolio or 3 examples of Instagram content you've created (Reels or carousels)

A short paragraph (3–4 sentences max) explaining why you'd be a good fit for a cycling page specifically — even if you're not a cyclist

Your availability and timezone

To confirm you've read this listing carefully, begin your application with the phrase "purple spoke" — applications that don't include this will not be reviewed

One idea for a Reel you'd create in your first week — just the concept in 2–3 sentences, including what raw footage you'd request from us

title: Lead Data Analyst, Returns and Credits
description:
We are looking for a highly technical and analytical Lead Analyst to own the data integrity of our returns and credits department. Your primary goal is ensuring that our refunds and credits are reported accurately, formatted correctly, and tracked meticulously.



Key Responsibilities:



Data Integrity & Auditing: Monitor the full lifecycle of refunds and credits. Ensure all data is updated, formatted correctly, and reported without errors.



SLA Tracking & Vendor Accountability: Build and maintain tracking systems for vendor performance. You will ensure we know exactly which refunds, credits, and returns are on time and which are pending.



Workflow Assignment: Generate daily reports that serve as the "action plan" for the Returns Coordinator and Credits Coordinator. You will assign specific tasks to them to clear backlogs and fix discrepancies.



Scripting & Automation: Utilize scripts (Python, VBA, or AI-generated code) to clean messy data, run complex audits, and automate manual reporting processes.



Financial Reconciliation: Work with accounting values to ensure that what is in our system matches the financial reality of our bank/credit memos.



The Ideal Candidate:



Analytical & Technical: You spend 95% of your time in the data. You are an expert in Excel and comfortable using scripts to manipulate large datasets.



Detail-Obsessed: You spot formatting errors and missing values immediately.



Directive: You are comfortable handing off work to tea
mbers and following up to ensure it was done correctly.



Resourceful: You know how to use tools (including AI) to write the scripts or formulas needed to get the job done efficiently.



Requirements:



High-level proficiency in Excel (complex formulas, PivotTables, VBA/Macros).



Experience with scripting/automation (using Python, SQL, or similar to process data). Using AI to create scripts is acceptable. We DO NOT expect this individual to know how to code, or create scripts on their own, however to leverage AI and understand the tools to run it.



Background in working with financial data, accounting values, or inventory reconciliation.



Proven ability to organize workflows and track SLAs.



Send in you CV or a link to a shared file with necessary access granted. No CV will be automatically ignored.

title: Sales Executive
description:
We are a UK-based education company seeking a driven and personable individual to join our team in a sales and student support capacity.



This is a client-facing role where you will be responsible for calling potential customers, handling sales enquiries, supporting existing students, and helping prospective students find the right course for them. We take a consultative approach to sales, and you will be building genuine relationships and helping people make informed decisions via phone, Zoom, and
.

You will be expected to develop a thorough knowledge of our business, our courses, and our industry quickly, and to apply that knowledge in every conversation you have on our behalf. You will work closely alongside our Executive Assistant, who manages the administrative side of our customer service, and you will be supporting her in ensuring our students receive an excellent experience at every touchpoint.



You must be a competent and confident communicator.



The role is full-time, working Monday to Friday on UK hours from 08:00 to 17:30 GMT/BST. As this is a dedicated position, we ask that this is your only job.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term. This is not a short-term position. We are looking for somebody who sees themselves staying with us for at least five years, and in return we offer excellent pay, regular increases that reflect your growth and contribution, and a genuinely supportive place to work.



Requirements



Exceptional spoken and written English is essential. You will also need a quiet, professional home working environment, a fast and reliable internet connection, and an ID verification score of 80 or above. Our team works with full transparency and all staff are subject to standard remote monitoring.



Please read before applying

We will not consider applicants who do not have advanced English.

We will not consider applicants who do not have an ID score above 80.

We will not consider applicants who do not provide an audio introduction.

We will not consider applicants who do not have an excellent internet connection.



How to apply

Please submit your CV along with an audio recording of 60 to 90 seconds introducing yourself and telling us why you are interested in this role. Applications received without an audio file will not be considered.

title: Remote SDR / Sales Development Rep - AI Automation Agency
description:
Remote SDR / Sales Development Rep - AI Automation Agency

(Base + Uncapped Commission)



About Us



We're RJ Media, an AI automation agency based in London. We build AI voice agents, text agents, CRM automations, and custom dashboards for service businesses internationally. We're growing fast and need a sharp, hungry SDR to own lead generation, qualification, and pipeline management.



What You'll Do



- Respond to all inbound DMs across Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn as fast as possible (speed is everything)

- Send outbound DMs to qualify and appointment set leads

- Run LinkedIn outbound: 25 personalised connection requests per day

- Follow up with warm leads who haven't booked

- Work every lead in our CRM (GoHighLevel) - chase cold leads, reactivate old ones, keep partners moving

- Pre-qualify and triage everyone who books a call

- Direct and oversee a VA who handles connection requests, lead magnet comment responses, and basic profile engagement

- Send an end-of-day report with your numbers

- Triage leads: flag hot prospects vs time-wasters so nothing falls through the cracks



What You Won't Do



- Technical delivery or building

- Post-sale client management



Requirements



- Excellent spoken and written English

- Previous SDR, sales, or appointment setting experience

- Fast responder. We're not looking for someone who clocks in 9-5 and disappears. We want an A-player who treats leads like they're their own business. If a DM comes in at 8pm, you reply. If a hot lead messages on a Saturday morning, you're on it. Obviously you sleep, but outside of that, speed wins.

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace

- Can start within 1 week



Nice to Have



- Experience in digital marketing, AI, or tech

- Familiar with GoHighLevel or similar CRM

- Previous agency experience

- Comfortable sitting in on sales calls (not required upfront, but this could be part of your growth path)



Compensation



- $350-400/month base

- 5% commission on setup fees from deals you generate that close - Uncapped (we sell products for $2k to $10k+ so commissions can be big)

- Expected total comp: $600-1,200/month based on performance

- 30-day performance review with a path to increased base if you're delivering



How to Apply



Record a 2-minute Loom video covering:



1. Introduce yourself and your sales/SDR experience

2. Do a mock cold DM to a business owner pitching AI automation services

3. Explain why you'd be great at talking to business owners about AI



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed. Send your Loom link with your application.

title: Tier 3 MSP Engineer – Remote
description:
Tier 3 MSP Engineer - Remote (Philippines) | Part-Time ? Full-Time Growth Path

Company: Ekim IT Solutions | Portland, Maine, USA

Hours: 6:00 AM - 10:00 AM Eastern (Mon-Fri) | Part-time to start, full-time conversion as company grows

Compensation: Competitive , based on experience

Platform: Remote (OnlineJobs.ph)



Who We Are

Ekim IT Solutions is a fast-growing, dental-specialized managed service provider based in Maine. We are the preferred IT partner of the Maine Dental Association and we serve dental practices across the Northeast and beyond. We are not a generic MSP. We are specialists, and we operate with discipline, speed, and a standard most MSPs in our market can't touch.

We are growing fast and we need someone who can keep up.



The Role

We are looking for a Tier 3 MSP Engineer who is an absolute force on the ticket queue.

This is not a button-pressing job. This is not for someone who escalates everything and waits to be told what to do. We need a technician who owns problems start to finish, thinks two steps ahead, and makes our boots-on-the-ground team in the US faster and more effective , not more dependent.

You will be the first line of fire every morning when our dental office managers arrive and start submitting issues. You will triage, resolve, escalate intelligently, and document , before most of our US team even has their coffee.

Your job is to make every other person on this team feel like they have a superpower.



Your Responsibilities



Own the ticket queue during your shift , triage, prioritize, and resolve with urgency

Handle Tier 2 and Tier 3 issues independently: networking, server, endpoint, M365, security, dental software integration

Support our on-site US engineers remotely , be the brain when they need one

Identify patterns in recurring issues and build toward permanent fixes, not band-aids

Maintain and contribute to our documentation in Hudu , if it isn't documented, fix that

Streamline internal processes , if something is inefficient, call it out and fix it

Communicate clearly with clients and internal team in written English





What You Must Have



10+ years of hands-on IT experience, with significant time inside a managed service provider

CCNA certification minimum , higher certifications (CCNP, MCSE, etc.) are a strong advantage

Deep experience with Microsoft 365 administration and security (Conditional Access, Entra ID, Defender, Exchange)

Strong Windows Server background , Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, GPO, Hyper-V

Solid networking fundamentals , VLANs, routing, firewall policy, VPN

Experience working with RMM and PSA platforms in an MSP environment

Excellent written and spoken English , you will interface directly with clients via phone and in writing, and will be expected to handle client calls independently over time





Bonus Points



Familiarity with any of our stack: HaloPSA, NinjaRMM, Huntress, Hudu, Axcient, Domotz, UniFi

Experience with dental practice software (Eaglesoft, Dentrix, Curve, Sidexis, Dexis)

Experience supporting HIPAA-compliant environments

Experience with Microsoft Azure or AWS





What to Expect

Week 1: You get acquainted with our systems, our clients, our stack, and our standards. We will invest in getting you up to speed.

Week 2 onward: You are expected to show value. We will know quickly if you are the right person.

We are direct. If something isn't working, we will tell you. If you are performing, we will reward it. As the company grows, this part-time role converts to full-time with expanded hours (5:00 AM - 1:00 PM Eastern). This is a long-term play for the right person.

We are a strong team that works hard, communicates well, and takes care of each other. If you want a place where your skills are actually used and recognized, this is it.



What We Offer



Unlimited paid time off , we measure output, not hours

Direct path to full-time employment , this role is designed to grow with you as the company scales

A team that actually values you , high standards go both ways; if you perform, you will be recognized and rewarded

Work with a specialized, fast-moving MSP that is ahead of the curve , not a stagnant shop with stale processes





A Word of Honesty

We have worked with talented engineers from the Philippines before and we are proud of those relationships. We are also being straight with you: we have had people attempt to coast , collect a paycheck, do the minimum, and treat this like easy money.

If that is what you are looking for, we are not the right fit and we would rather you know that now.

We structured this role intentionally at 4 hours per day. We understand many of you work multiple jobs and that is completely fine , this schedule was built with that in mind. Work your other job. Build your life. But when you are on our clock, you are all in.

We work hard. We move fast. We hold each other to a high standard. If you want a place where that energy is matched and rewarded, you will thrive here. If you are looking for easy money, we can save you the trouble.



How to Apply

To be considered, you must submit a video application.

Apply directly on this website and, in addition, record a Loom video under 2 minutes and send the link along with a quick note to 
 to be considered. Your video must begin with the words "Hey Mike" or your application will not be reviewed. This is a simple instruction. It tells us everything we need to know about whether you follow direction.

In your video, cover:



Your background and why you are qualified for this role

A specific example of a complex technical problem you solved independently at an MSP

How you are going to make an immediate impact on our team



We are not looking for someone who is available. We are looking for someone who is exceptional.

If that's you, apply.

Work Structure:

Many of the systems we use can be learned quickly by someone who is motivated and systematic.



Application Instructions

title: 3D Environment Artist — XR Language Learning Platform

3D Environment Artist — XR Language Learning Platform

Contract · Remote · Immediate Start



~20 hours to start with potential to scale up 



About the Project



We are building an adaptive extended reality (XR) platform for language learning. Learners acquire new languages by navigating fully immersive 3D environments — markets, homes, transit systems, workplaces — built to reflect the real cultures where those languages live. The platform is grounded in peer-reviewed second language acquisition research and is designed for individual learners, institutional programs, and clinical research use.



Authenticity is the core requirement. A learner acquiring Spanish inside a generic room with floating vocabulary cards is not acquiring Spanish. A learner navigating a Mexico City market — with the right light, the right objects, the right ambient motion — is. Every scene we build is a language environment first and a visual experience second.



The Role

We are looking for a contract 3D artist to build culturally accurate scenes and objects for use in XR language learning environments. You will create the physical world our learners inhabit — and that means getting the details right, not just aesthetically but culturally. A Korean convenience store, a Brazilian bus station, a Moroccan kitchen — each one needs to feel like it belongs to the place and the language it represents.



This is creative and research-adjacent work. You will collaborate directly with the founder, have latitude on execution, and be accountable for cultural authenticity.



What You Will Do



*Model culturally specific objects, props, and environments in FBX format for real-time XR use

*Build and optimize complete scenes — interior and exterior — to run on Meta Quest and mobile hardware

*Animate environmental elements to create believable ambient life (doors, vehicles, market stalls, ambient crowd motion — not character rigs)

*Light scenes to match the natural and artificial lighting conditions of each target culture and geography

*Research cultural references — architecture, signage, product brands, materials, clothing, food — to ensure every scene is accurate, not generic

*Iterate based on feedback from language content and pedagogy review

*Deliver assets compatible with Unity and the project pipeline





What You Bring



*Portfolio of real-time 3D environments — game, XR, or simulation

*Proficiency in the FBX pipeline: modeling, UV unwrapping, texturing, export

*Experience animating environmental objects (not character rigs)

*Strong lighting skills for interior and exterior real-time environments

*Genuine interest in cultural accuracy — willingness to research before building

*Experience with Unity or ability to deliver assets that integrate cleanly into a Unity project

*Ability to work independently with clear briefs and minimal hand-holding





What a Strong Application Looks Like

*Your portfolio should include at least one culturally specific environment — not a fantasy dungeon or sci-fi corridor, but a real place that belongs to a real culture. A Pakistani chai dhaba, a Japanese convenience store, a West African street market stall — something that shows you research before you build. Bonus if it was built for real-time rendering.

*A wrong sign, a wrong product on a shelf, or a wrong light source breaks immersion — and breaks the language learning experience with it. We are looking for artists who understand that instinctively.



How to Apply

Send your portfolio and a brief note on your experience with culturally specific environments. Include "3D Artist" in your subject line.

Rate: Open — speed and accuracy will be compensated accordingly

Start: Immediate

Engagement type: Contract, remote

title: Meta Media Buyer (E-Commerce, Creative-Focused) 2026
description:
About Us -



We’re a growth partner agency dedicated to scaling direct-to-consumer (DTC) e-commerce brands. Our philosophy is simple: creative is king. The difference between profitable growth and wasted spend lies in understanding how to test, rotate, and scale ad creatives.



We’re looking for a Media Buyer who thrives in this environment—someone who isn’t just clicking buttons in Ads Manager, but who understands that creative testing, iteration, and rotation are the levers that move accounts forward.



Role Overview -



This role is about more than media buying. It’s about partnering with our creative team to:

- Identify which creative concepts are worth testing.

- Structure campaigns to consistently test new creatives without disrupting performance.

- Manage ad accounts in the $30,000–$80,000/month range, while also launching new accounts from scratch.

- Understand how to balance ABO testing structures with CBO scaling structures.

- Continuously feed learnings back into creative strategy, ensuring the account never runs stale.



Core Responsibilities -



- Execute on our proven campaign structures that prioritize creative testing and rotation.

- Launch and scale Meta ad accounts for DTC e-commerce brands.

- Analyze weekly creative scorecards to identify winners, cut losers, and guide next creative iterations.

- Collaborate directly with designers and editors to ensure ad production aligns with testing frameworks.

- Optimize campaigns for profitable growth using key metrics (ROAS, MER, CTR, CPM, CPA).

- Spot funnel bottlenecks and surface insights beyond the ad account when needed.



Requirements -



- 2+ years of e-commerce media buying experience (agency or brand-side).

- Proven success managing ad spend between $30,000–$80,000/month.

- Experience launching brand-new accounts and scaling them to consistent performance.

- Deep understanding of creative performance: thumbnails, hooks, copy, angles, and iterations.

- Comfort running systematic creative testing frameworks (ABO for testing, CBO for scaling).

- Strong analytical skills and the ability to translate data into creative next steps.

- Excellent communication skills—able to articulate what’s working, what’s not, and why.



Nice to Have -



- Experience with TikTok Ads and/or Google Ads.

- Familiarity with Airtable dashboards, creative scorecards, and other ad reporting tools.

- Understanding of landing page optimization and funnel performance beyond the ad account.



What We Offer -



- Remote-first, flexible work environment.

- Opportunity to work with fast-scaling DTC brands that value creative excellence.

- A culture built around results, learning, and testing.

- Clear growth opportunities as our agency scales.



How to Apply -



Send your resume and a short introduction. Please include:

1. Examples of ad accounts you’ve managed (with average monthly spend).

2. A breakdown of how you’ve approached creative testing and rotation in past roles.

(Not required, but helpful): Send a Loom video reviewing some of your previous results/case studies & talk about the process involved in scaling the ad account.

3. Please include your WhatsApp number for the quickest response time.

We are a fast-growing real estate company based in Washington & Idaho focused on solving complex property situations. We specialize in helping families with inherited properties, tax issues, and title problems.

-

 / FamilySearch

Compensation & Schedule:

We are looking for someone who enjoys solving puzzles and finding answers others cannot.



If that sounds like you, apply now.

title: Systems Monitoring & Account Maintenance VA (IT)
description:
JOB TITLE

Systems Monitoring & Account Maintenance VA



---



JOB DESCRIPTION



An established Australian business is looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA to take over daily monitoring and maintenance of multiple systems and accounts.



This is not a standard Monday-Friday role. The work runs every single day, including weekends, and requires consistency and discipline. The same core tasks must be completed daily to a high standard, without drop-off in accuracy or focus.



Your core work will involve logging into remote machines each day, checking that everything is running correctly, restarting anything that has stopped, recording account balances in a spreadsheet, flagging unusual activity, and carrying out small maintenance actions as directed. The work is repetitive, detail-critical, and must be executed consistently every day.



If you have experience in operations monitoring, account management, IT helpdesk, data entry, or any role where you were responsible for checking systems, recording information accurately, and keeping things running smoothly on a daily basis, this role will suit you well.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time position, 40 hours per week

* Stable, long-term role with an Australian business

* 20,000php starting salary during probation

* 23,500php + 1,500php benefits post probation (~1 month)

* KPI-based performance bonuses after approximately 3 months

* 13th month pay and government-mandated benefits

* Full training provided through screen-recorded sessions

* Fully remote - work from home

* Genuine scope for role growth into financial admin over time



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO (TRAINING PROVIDED)



* Log into multiple remote machines daily and confirm everything is running correctly

* Restart software or machines that have stopped and ensure all systems are operational

* Record account balances accurately in a spreadsheet

* Review recent activity and flag anything unusual

* Carry out small maintenance actions as directed

* After 2-3 months, produce daily summaries of accounts needing attention and take on additional reporting tasks



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Strong attention to detail - accurate balance recording across many accounts is the core of this role and mistakes have direct consequences

* Comfortable with REPETITIVE, ROUTINE WORK performed to a high standard every single day

* AVAILABLE TO WORK 7 DAYS A WEEK, with days off taken Monday to Wednesday if needed

* Able to maintain focus and consistency even on weekends or quieter shifts

* Able to follow instructions from screen-recorded training sessions, take your own notes, and execute independently without needing things re-explained

* Willing to speak up immediately when something is unclear rather than guessing

* Comfortable learning and working inside remote desktop and browser-based software daily

* Reliable internet connection and computer setup



---



NICE TO HAVE



* Experience with account management or similar monitoring roles

* Experience with remote desktop tools (AnyDesk, TeamViewer, Chrome Remote Desktop)

* Experience with multi-profile browsers or similar tools

* Background in IT support, helpdesk, or systems monitoring



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* 7 days per week (days off Monday to Wednesday if needed)

* Core hours: 11:00am to 4:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT)

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



---



This role suits someone who takes pride in doing the same job well every day, pays close attention to detail even on routine tasks, and is specifically looking for a structured, DAILY WORKLOAD rather than a standard weekday-only job. If that sounds like you - apply now.

title: CONTENT & AFFILIATE ASSISTANT
description:
We are looking for a creative, detail-oriented Content & Affiliate Assistant to join a growing faith-forward brand. This is a remote, part-time contractor role working 10 to 20 hours per week with room to grow.

 

ABOUT THE BRAND

 

Danielle Stringer is a multi-six-figure creative entrepreneur behind Digital Dust (a digital template subscription library) and Learn with Danielle, a platform housing her Limitless Mastermind coaching program and myLimitlessCRM, a white-label CRM for creative entrepreneurs. Our audience is loyal, our offers are proven, and we are building fast.

 

WHAT YOU WILL DO

 

You will work directly under our Operations Manager, Lindsay, who owns content strategy and brand direction. Your job is execution: take her vision and bring it to life.

 

- Create monthly batches of social media graphics in Canva for two brands using existing templates

- Submit work for approval, apply feedback, and load approved content into Metricool for scheduling

- Build and maintain Amazon storefront lists and create graphics for Mavely affiliate promotions

- Add finished affiliate assets to Metricool for ongoing auto-rotation

- Help grow our Etsy shop over time by uploading designs to Printify and creating listings

- Communicate clearly on Slack, track hours weekly in Toggl, and show up reliably

 

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 

- Strong Canva skills, not just technically but aesthetically. You understand brand consistency, know what looks right, and can create variety without losing the feel of a brand.

- Experience with Amazon Storefront and Mavely at a working level

- Familiar with Metricool for multi-platform scheduling

- Self-starter who takes direction well and respects the approval process

- Proactive communicator. If you are stuck, you say something.

- High integrity. This is a small team and trust matters more than almost anything else.

- Faith-forward values. Danielle's brand is visibly and proudly rooted in faith. This should feel like a fit, not a compromise.

 

TOOLS REQUIRED AT HIRE

 

Canva, Metricool, Amazon Storefront, Mavely

GoHighLevel familiarity is a strong plus.

 

COMPENSATION

 

Hourly. Rate based on experience. Global candidates are welcome.

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Send all four of the following to 

 

1. A short video introduction. Tell us who you are, why this role excites you, and what makes your design eye different.

2. Your resume.

3. Your portfolio. Show us brand content, affiliate graphics, or digital product creative. Links or files both work.

4. Your favorite morning beverage. (We will tell you why this matters after you get the job.)

 

Applications missing any of the four items above will not be reviewed. This is intentional. We are hiring someone who follows direction carefully, and this is the first step.

 

We look forward to hearing from you.

description:

About us:

We are Mynd, a New Zealand-based ecommerce brand focused on premium mushroom supplements for brain health and performance. We work directly with customers online and place a strong emphasis on quality, trust, and clear communication.



This role is offered on an independent contractor basis and is focused on written support only — no calls required.



You’ll be responding to customers via
,
, and Instagra
ssages/comments, all managed through our support platform Gorgias.



This is a part-time role of up to 20 hours per week.



---



Overview



You’ll be responsible for ensuring customers receive clear, timely, and helpful responses, while maintaining a consistent brand tone.



We provide:



* Pre-written FAQs and response templates

* Gorgias AI tools to assist with replies

* Clear workflows and support processes



---



Your Responsibilities



Your daily responsibilities will include:



1. Respond to customer enquiries via:



   *

   *
 messages & comments

   * Instagra
ssages & comments

     (All managed within Gorgias)



2. Use pre-written FAQs, templates, and AI suggestions to respond efficiently and consistently



3. Understand customer needs, clarify issues, and provide helpful solutions



4. Update Shopify orders within Gorgias based on customer requests (e.g. address changes, order updates, cancellations where applicable)



5. Escalate more complex queries when needed



6. Maintain fast response times in line with our support expectations



7. Keep conversations organised and updated within Gorgias



8. Send a brief daily report/update on key activity, issues, or insights



---



What We’re Looking For



* Experience using Gorgias (preferred)

* Strong written English and communication skills

* Friendly, clear, and professional tone

* Ability to follow systems and processes

* Attention to detail and organisation

* Comfortable working independently



---



Nice to Have



* Experience in ecommerce customer support

* Familiarity with Meta platforms 
 & Instagram)

* Experience using helpdesk tools or CRMs



---



## Working Setup



* Fully remote

* Work completed online using Gorgias

* Flexible hours (with expected responsiveness during agreed times)



---



How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short paragraph on what you believe makes good customer support

2. Your experience using Gorgias (customer support platform)

3. Examples of previous customer support work



Important: Please include the phrase “Customer Support for Mushroom Supplements” in your subject line so we know you’ve read this fully.



---



We’re looking for someone reliable, thoughtful, and easy to work with — someone who can represent our brand well in every customer interaction.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Executive Assistant to Medical Doctor - RN ONLY!
description:

This role requires someone who can anticipate needs, streamline operations, and ensure the physician’s day-to-day activities run efficiently.



The ideal candidate is a Registered Nurse, has experience supporting healthcare professionals, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and can balance administrative, operational, and communication tasks with professionalism and discretion.

Coordinate appointments, ensuring efficiency and minimal downtime

Handle
 management: prioritize, respond, and flag urgent communications

Clinic Operations Support

mbers (medical staff, admin, marketing)

Administrative & Business Support

What We’re Looking For

Process Automation knowledge or experience is a plus



Skills:

Ability to work independently and take initiative.

High attention to detail and ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

Familiarity with healthcare processes and medical terminology.



Why Join Us?

Work from the comfort of your home.

Opportunity to use both your healthcare and sales expertise.

Supportive and collaborative work environment.

Competitive salary



Technical:

Computer literate: Microsoft apps, Google suites, EHR, tech savvy

Computer/laptop

Webcam

Headset with noise cancellation

Working space with no background noise

Please include the word VIP in your application subject
