title: Sales Closer – Digital Marketing & Lead Generation Services
description:
Sales Closer – Digital Marketing & Lead Generation Services

Company: BrandSwaggin / BrandBots

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: US Eastern Hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST), Monday–Friday

Type: Full-Time | Salary + Commission + Growth Opportunity



Who We Are

We run two digital marketing companies based in the US:

BrandSwaggin — a full-service web design and marketing agency.

BrandBots — an AI-powered outbound lead generation service that creates real sales conversations for businesses using deeply personalized
 outreach.

We're growing fast and we need a closer — someone who can get on calls, build rapport quickly, and turn warm conversations into paying clients.



What You'll Be Doing



Getting on sales calls daily with prospects who have already expressed interest (we generate the leads — you close them)

Running 20–25 minute discovery and demo calls for BrandBots and BrandSwaggin services

Walking prospects through live platform demos and explaining how our lead gen and marketing services work

Following up with prospects via
, text, and phone to move deals forward

Closing deals on the call — no lengthy proposal chains, no weeks of back-and-forth

Tracking your pipeline and updating our CRM (OnePageCRM) daily

Switching between selling lead generation, SEO, web design, and other digital marketing services depending on the prospect's needs

Providing feedback on what objections you're hearing so we can sharpen our offer and materials





Who You Are

You MUST have:



Proven experience selling digital marketing services (lead gen, SEO, web design, paid ads, or similar)

A strong understanding of how these services work — not just surface-level buzzwords, but real knowledge of the sales structure behind tech and marketing services

Native-level English speaking ability — you will be on calls with US-based business owners daily, and you need to sound natural, confident, and credible

Real, demonstrable results — closed deals, revenue generated, conversion rates. We want to see numbers, not just job titles.

A reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace for calls

The discipline to work US Eastern hours (9 AM – 5 PM EST) consistently without supervision



You ARE:



A self-starter who takes ownership of your pipeline and doesn't wait to be told what to do

Coachable — you take direction, apply it, and improve fast

Resilient — you don't crumble after a bad call or a tough week

Reliable — you show up every single day, on time, ready to work. Period.

Hungry — you see commission as an opportunity, not a risk





Please Do NOT Apply If:



You call out sick because of a cough, bad weather, or because you're "not feeling it"

You get overwhelmed when things move fast and your response is to go silent or disappear

You've never actually sold a service — just "managed accounts" or "handled inquiries"

You can't explain what a sales funnel, ICP, or discovery call is without Googling it

You're looking for a chill, low-effort job where you answer
s and collect a paycheck



We've been burned by no-shows and ghosters. If that's your pattern, save us both the time.



What's In It for You



Competitive base salary — paid consistently, on time, every time

Commission on every deal you close — uncapped earning potential

Real growth path — this isn't a dead-end VA role. As we scale to 100+ clients, the person in this seat will grow into a sales leadership position

Training and support — we have a full sales playbook, demo scripts, objection handling guides, and a practice call system ready for you. You won't be thrown in cold.

You'll be selling a service that sells itself — our lead gen offer is performance-based with no contracts and no monthly retainers. Prospects love it. You just need to land the plane.





How to Apply

Do not send a generic cover letter. Instead, reply with the following:



A 60-second video or voice memo (phone recording is fine) introducing yourself and pitching us on why you're the right fit. Sell us. This is how we hear your English and your energy.

Your top 3 results from selling digital marketing or tech services. Be specific — what did you sell, to whom, deal size, close rate, etc.

Your answer to this question: A prospect says, "This sounds great, but I want to think about it and maybe revisit next quarter." What do you say? (Write your actual response — not a textbook answer.)

Your availability to start. We're ready to move fast with the right person.



Applications without the video/voice memo will not be reviewed.

title: Automation Expert (Zapier / Make / AI Agents) – Project-Based, Immediate Start

We have a lead generation dashboard that sends inbound leads (contact info,
 transcripts, intent signals, etc.) to a dedicated
 inbox



We want those
s:

Key data extracted (name, company,
, intent, notes, transcript snippets)

, APIs, and webhooks

Extract, transform, and route data across tools and platforms



Improve internal organization, handoffs, and communication



Recommend better system architecture (not just “build what’s asked”)



Document workflows clearly so they’re maintainable



What We’re Looking For



Must-Haves



Proven experience automating operations for real companies (not just personal projects)



Strong experience with:



Zapier







APIs & webhooks



Data parsing and formatting



Comfortable working with AI models (Claude, GPT, agents, structured outputs)



Strong problem-solving skills when integrations don’t exist out of the box



Clear communicator — you can explain why something should be built a certain way



Nice-to-Haves



Experience automating CRMs or internal tools



Ops, RevOps, or sales automation experience



Familiarity with dashboards, lead-gen systems, or outbound workflows



Ability to suggest improvements beyond the initial request



Engagement Details



Type: Project-based (multiple projects available)



Start: Immediate



Scope: Short-term builds with potential long-term collaboration



Opportunity: Strong chance of ongoing or full-time work if it’s a good fit

How to Apply



When applying, please include:

Examples of companies or systems you’ve automated



Tools you’re strongest with (Zapier, Make, APIs, AI, etc.)



Any relevant examples of automations you’re proud of



We’re looking for someone who can think like an operator, not just execute tasks.

title: Website Content & Support Specialist
description:
Role: Website Content & Support Specialist 



We’re seeking a detail-oriented, English-proficient, and resourceful Duda website professional to join our team full-time. This role focuses on maintaining and updating existing websites, handling customer change requests, and providing prompt and thoughtful support. Duda site design from pre-made templates will be required when needed, but will not be the primary focus of this role



If you enjoy interpreting client needs, solving technical problems, and working within a collaborative team, we’d love to hear from you.



PLEASE NOTE: This position aligns with 9 am - 5 pm EST hours. You must be online & available during these hours.



What You'll Do:

•Website Maintenance: Implement content changes, troubleshoot layout and performance issues, fix links, and ensure ongoing functionality of live websites.

Customer Support & Communication:

•Respond to change requests and client questions received via website forms,
, or helpdesk tools.

•Interpret vague or incomplete requests using context clues to determine the intended update or issue.

•Confirm client intent or suggest solutions where appropriate to ensure satisfaction.

Support Ticket Triage:

•Assess and prioritize incoming support tickets, resolving straightforward requests efficiently.

•Escalate technical or complex issues to the right tea
mber, providing context and clarity.

Internal Collaboration: Work closely with project managers and tea
mbers through Slack to stay aligned on task statuses, blockers, and deadlines.

Quality Assurance: Follow internal QA processes and Standard Operating Procedures to maintain consistency and quality across all client sites.

Occasional Visual Work: Basic Photoshop editing may be requested; video tutorials are available.

•Website design - Designing sites from templates when our pipeline is congested. This is not the main role, but Duda site design is a plus. 



*Note: This is primarily a maintenance and support role, not a full-time new-build designer position; however, occasional Duda site design will be required when needed. You’ll be working with existing Duda sites and templates, focusing on quality, consistency, and clear communication.



Tools & Software You'll Use:

•Duda – For website edits and maintenance.

•Zoho Desk - Our ticketing system 

•Heylogin – Secure access to shared resources (e.g., Shutterstock, Envato Elements).

•Slack – Internal communication and collaboration.

•Helpdesk &
 – For managing customer feedback and support tickets.

•Photoshop (Optional) – For minor adjustments based on internal guides.



What Makes You a Strong Fit:

•Strong command of Duda and basic front-end skills – You are confident working within the Duda platform and can make effective use of its editor. You’re comfortable applying light customizations using HTML and CSS, such as styling tweaks, embedded widgets, or code injections, without disrupting site layout or performance.

•Excellent English proficiency (written and spoken) – You’ll be working with client communications daily and must clearly understand and articulate solutions.

•Critical thinking and context recognition – You can read between the lines of vague customer requests and deduce intent.

•Proactive problem-solving – You fix small issues before they grow and speak up early if you’re blocked.

•Deadline ownership – You complete work on time without needing last-minute nudges.

•Attention to detail – You follow instructions carefully and take pride in pixel-perfect site maintenance.

•Team collaboration – You communicate effectively via Slack, give regular progress updates, and thrive in a remote team environment. Availability during Eastern Standard Time (EST) working hours is preferred, especially for overlapping with tea
etings or urgent client requests.



Salary & Performance Expectations:

Probationary Period (90 Days):

 $1,000 USD/month

Handle daily maintenance tasks and customer requests/tickets.

Demonstrate clear written communication, accurate interpretation of requests, and QA-aligned execution.



Post-Probation:

 $1,250 USD/month

Continue with consistent ticket handling, support responsiveness, and excellent communication.

Duda site creation from pre-designed templates may be requested if our design queue is full



This probationary period is considered at-will employment. If the new hire is unable to meet deadlines, maintain quality standards, or communicate effectively with the team, the working relationship may be ended at any time. All time worked will be compensated appropriately.



Why Work with Us?

Stable, ongoing workflow with minimal surprises.

We've successfully partnered with Duda designers in the Philippines since 2021.

On-time payments and transparent communication.

A supportive team culture that values your voice and growth.



Ready to Apply?

In your application, please include:

Links to Duda websites you’ve worked on (especially ones involving edits or updates).

Your weekly availability.

Any questions you may have.

Your Duda skill level (1–5).

Your spoken and written English comfort level (1–5).

Your ability to join frequent Slack / Google Meet calls (1–5).

Your comfort level with designing a Duda site built from templates (1-5)



After reviewing your application, we’ll reach out with the next step in our assessment process. If selected, you’ll receive a task that evaluates your communication skills, clarity, and critical thinking. You’ll have 3 days to complete the task.

title: Guest Communications Assistant Application Form
description:
Role Overview



(You will need to complete the form below)



We are looking for a highly organised, friendly, and proactive Virtual Assistant to join our growing serviced accommodation and Airbnb business.



The Guest Communications Assistant will be responsible for handling all guest communication across our portfolio of short-stay properties. The ideal candidate will ensure guests receive fast, professional, and helpful responses before, during, and after their stay, helping to maintain excellent guest satisfaction and 5-star reviews.



This is a remote role and would suit someone with previous experience in customer service, hospitality, Airbnb, 
, or virtual assistant work.



Main Responsibilities



Pre-Booking & Enquiry Management

Respond promptly to new enquiries from Airbnb, 
, VRBO, direct bookings, and other platforms

Answer questions about:

Property features

Parking

Pet policies

Bed layouts

Location and local amenities

Discounts for longer stays

Availability and pricing

Encourage potential guests to complete bookings

Upsell optional extras such as:

Early check-in

Late check-out

Pet stays

Additional cleaning



Guest Communication Before Arrival



Send confirmation messages after booking

Provide check-in instructions, parking information, Wi-Fi details, house rules, and access information

Chase guests to complete:

Guest registration forms

ID verification

Security deposit or waiver

Signed terms and conditions

Follow up with guests who have not completed required steps

Ensure all information is collected before arrival



During Stay Support



Monitor guest messages daily and respond quickly

Handle common guest queries including:

Wi-Fi issues

Heating instructions

Parking questions

Appliance use

Lost keys

Extra towels or bedding requests

Minor complaints

Escalate urgent maintenance issues to the relevant tea
mber or contractor

Coordinate with cleaners, maintenance staff, and management when needed

Keep guests updated while issues are being resolved



Post-Stay Communication



Send thank you messages after checkout

Request 5-star reviews from satisfied guests

Respond professionally to guest reviews

Follow up regarding damages, missing items, or additional charges where necessary

Record guest feedback and recurring issues





Daily Tasks



Monitor all guest communication channels throughout the day

Reply to all new messages within:

5–15 minutes during working hours

Maximum 1 hour outside core hours if on shift

Maintain organised notes on each guest booking

Update systems such as:

Airbnb



Guest portal / SuiteOp

WhatsApp


Google Sheets or CRM

Keep templates and standard responses updated

Flag urgent matters immediately





Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Average response time under 15 minutes

Maintain guest review scores of 4.8–5.0 stars

High completion rate for guest registration and ID checks before arrival

Minimal missed messages or unresolved issues

Positive guest feedback and repeat bookings





Required Skills & Experience



Excellent written English and communication skills

Friendly, calm, and professional approach

Strong attention to detail

Ability to multitask and manage multiple guest conversations at once





Previous experience in:

Airbnb



Short-term rentals

Customer service

Virtual assistant work



Comfortable using:

Airbnb platform


 Extranet

Gmail

WhatsApp

Google Docs / Sheets

Property management systems

Able to work independently and make sensible decisions



Preferred Experience



Experience with SuiteOp, Uplisting, Hostaway, Hospitable, or similar systems

Understanding of serviced accommodation / short-term rental operations

Experience coordinating cleaners or maintenance contractors

Familiar with UK-based guest expectations and hospitality standards



Working Hours



Flexible remote role

Ideally available across mornings, evenings, and weekends on a rota basis

Example hours:

8:00am–12:00pm

5:00pm–9:00pm

May require some weekend coverage



Pay



Competitive hourly rate or fixed monthly salary depending on experience

Potential for increased responsibility and progression as the business grows



Example Tasks You May Be Given



Reply to a guest asking for an early check-in

Chase a guest to complete their ID verification

Handle a complaint about Wi-Fi not working

Send check-in instructions to tomorrow’s arrivals

Ask a guest for a review after a successful stay

Coordinate with a cleaner if a guest requests additional towels





Complete this form:

title: YouTube Long Form Editor Business Discipline Christianity
Payroll Administrator
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We are looking for a Payroll Administrator responsible for maintaining payroll systems and ensuring accurate, timely processing of employee compensation. This role includes reviewing timesheets, managing payroll data, calculating pay (including raises, bonuses, and commissions), and distributing funds to employee accounts. A key part of this position is accurately calculating, verifying, and processing sales commissions based on company compensation structures, so strong attention to detail, solid mathematical skills, and hands-on experience with commission-based payroll are essential.



Responsibilities:

Checking production sheets for accuracy

Entering data into databases and sheets

Handling direct deposit requests and data

Acquiring all necessary signatures to distribute payroll

Processing wage garnishments

Making adjustments in pay for raises, bonuses, and commission

Calculating, verifying, and processing sales commissions based on company compensation plans

Collaborating with Sales and Treasury Divisions to ensure commission accuracy and timely payouts



Qualifications/Requirements:

Excellent attention to detail

Exceptional mathematical and calculation skills

Verbal and written communication

Ability to work with a team

Knowledge of different types of payroll software

Knowledge of payroll, garnishments, and benefits distribution

Multitasking abilities

Good research and analysis skills

Strong understanding of sales commission structures, calculations, and payout processes

Experience handling commission-based compensation and resolving discrepancies preferred



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.

 us at 
 (
). Include the job title in the subject line. Thank you.

title: Sales and Marketing/ Biz Development
description:
Role Description



English is extremely important as well as professionalism with a polished appearance since phone calls will be essential in this role.

Key responsibilities include developing and implementing sales plans, cultivating client relationships, identifying new market opportunities, and providing comprehensive training on sales strategies and product offerings. Collaboration and effective communication will be central to success in this position.

Strong Communication and Customer Service skills.

Proficiency in Sales, with the ability to meet sales targets and develop client accounts.

Customer Success is a critical aspect of this role.

Analytical and problem-solving skills for identifying market trends and optimizing strategies

Ability to work independently in a remote, dynamic environment



About Our Company



Single Serve Merch is an innovative platform that unifies a store builder, on-demand manufacturing, and order fulfillment into one seamless ecosystem. The platform is designed to help businesses streamline processes, reduce operational hurdles, and cater to customer needs efficiently. Known for its intuitive design and comprehensive features, Single Serve empowers users to scale their businesses with ease. By blending technology and convenience, Single Serve revolutionizes the merchandising experience.

title: Capcut/Tik-Tok Editor
description:
Short Form Video Editor (CapCut / TikTok) | 6–10 Videos Daily | $400/month



Part Time Role With Long Term Potential



I am hiring a skilled short form video editor who understands TikTok style pacing, strong b roll usage, and fast turnaround workflows.



This role requires speed, consistency, and attention to detail. You will be working closely with me on a fast growing social media brand producing daily short form content.



Pay & Work Details



• Salary: $400/month (with early potential for raise) + performance bonuses

• Hours: 4 to 5 hours daily (depending on efficiency)

• Output: 6 to 10 videos per day

• Schedule: 6 to 7 days per week (flexible days off allowed)

• Turnaround: All assignments must be completed within 24 hours or less

• Payment method: Wise



This is a production focused role. Speed and consistency matter.



Your Main Responsibilities



You will be editing short form videos that include:



• Cutting dead space from talking head content

• Adding overlays, images, and captions

• Using dynamic zooms and cropping to keep videos engaging

• Creating strong b roll sequences that match voiceovers

• Matching visuals tightly with narration

• Producing fast paced, engaging short form content

• Working through footage to find strong visual matches

• Following instructions while maintaining efficiency



Editors who understand pacing and viewer retention perform best in this role.



Editing Style Examples



Review these carefully before applying. You should feel confident you can match this style.



Talking Head Video





Talking Head with Green Screen Overlays





B Roll Driven Content



Requirements



• Proven experience editing short form content

• Skilled with b roll editing and matching visuals to voiceover

• Strong English comprehension

• Ability to create fast paced, engaging edits

• High attention to detail

• Reliable internet connection

• Comfortable receiving feedback

• Able to edit 6 to 10 videos daily

• Able to consistently meet 24 hour turnaround deadlines

• Available for 4 to 5 hours daily

• Able to work most days of the week

• Must accept payments through Wise

• Philippines timezone or similar preferred



Important — Read Carefully

To be considered for this role, you must complete the written assignment below.

It should take less than one hour if you actually understand short form editing.



Applicants who skip the assignment or submit low effort responses will not be considered.



Assignment Link:

title: Credentialing Specialist (Mental Health Practice)
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Credentialing Specialist to support our growing mental health group practice serving California and Nevada. This role is responsible for managing the end-to-end credentialing process for providers, maintaining accurate provider profiles, and ensuring ongoing compliance with payer and regulatory requirements.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage initial credentialing and re-credentialing applications for providers with commercial insurance panels and government payers



Maintain and regularly update provider profiles in CAQH/ProView and other credentialing platforms



Complete re-attestations and ensure timely submission of all required documentation



Submit and track rate increase requests with insurance payers as needed



Monitor credentialing status and follow up with payers to ensure timely processing



Maintain accurate records of credentialing activities, approvals, and expirations



Ensure providers remain in compliance with licensing, malpractice insurance, and payer requirements



Collaborate with administrative and clinical teams regarding credentialing timelines and updates



Stay current on credentialing requirements in California and Nevada



Qualifications:



Fluency in English (written and verbal) required



Demonstrated knowledge of the credentialing process for U.S. behavioral health providers



Experience with CAQH/ProView profile management and attestations



Familiarity with insurance paneling in California and Nevada preferred



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Ability to manage multiple providers and deadlines simultaneously



Effective communication and follow-up skills



Experience in a mental health or healthcare setting preferred



Preferred Skills:



Experience with EHR and credentialing tracking systems



Knowledge of payer-specific requirements and workflows



Ability to work independently and proactively resolve issues

title: Real Estate - Bookkeeper
description:
Before applying, please watch this video: 
/share/
a9d
e91db



Please submit your CV/resume along with a short video or audio introduction summarizing your experience and why you’re a great fit for this role.



We are a rapidly growing real estate asset management company seeking an experienced, detail-driven Virtual Bookkeeper to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who understands the complexities of real estate accounting, thrives in a structured and process-oriented environment, and can independently manage financial records with precision. If you enjoy supporting multiple properties or business units and take pride in maintaining clean, accurate books, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and manage financial records within QuickBooks, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and compliance across all accounts

- Structure and refine account categories, subcategories, and classes—including building out custom classifications as needed

- Perform comprehensive bank and credit card reconciliations by comparing transactions across QuickBooks, bank statements, and vendor records

- Handle data entry for journal entries, payroll files, W9s, invoices, receipts, and all financial documentation

- Prepare, review, and analyze financial reports such as Profit & Loss statements, Balance Sheets, and property/entity-specific summaries

- Track, manage, and report income and expenses across multiple properties or real estate business units

- Create, post, and reconcile payments, invoices, bills, and vendor transactions

- Maintain a clean and accurate Chart of Accounts with ongoing updates to support operational needs

- Learn and utilize additional financial or reporting tools as the company expands

- Ensure all accounts remain up to date, including investor distributions, mortgages, insurance, utilities, vendors, and credit card payments

- Manage inventory, assets, and property-related financial records



Qualifications:

- Proven experience as a Bookkeeper—preferably in real estate, asset management, or property management

- Strong proficiency in QuickBooks (required) and solid grounding in accounting principles

- Exceptional attention to detail, accuracy, and consistency when handling financial data

- Ability to work independently, manage deadlines, and stay organized with minimal supervision

- Strong communication skills (written and verbal) with a proactive, problem-solving mindset

- Familiarity with real estate accounting best practices, industry standards, and compliance requirements

- Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (preferred but not required)

- Bookkeeping or accounting certifications (e.g., QuickBooks ProAdvisor) are a strong plus



To Apply:

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Job Title: Customer Representative

Compensation: $600/month



About Us

We’re a dynamic agency driven by growth, innovation, and the desire to make an impact. By combining smart systems with human creativity, we empower brands to streamline, scale, and stay ahead of the curve.



Position Overview

We are seeking a communicative and detail-oriented Customer Representative to serve as the bridge to our customers. This role is ideal for a professional who thrives on solving problems, building relationships, and delivering exceptional customer experiences. If you enjoy a fast-paced, collaborative environment and are passionate about helping others, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Interaction: Respond to customer inquiries via
, chat, or social channels using Gorgias our centralized customer support platform. Ensure responses are prompt, personalized, and reflect our commitment to empowering confident, radiant skin.





Issue Resolution: Troubleshoot order concerns, product-related questions, and skincare guidance with empathy and efficiency. Escalate complex issues to appropriate teams when needed, always aiming to deliver a seamless customer experience.





Support Services: Educate customers on our skincare line, product benefits, usage recommendations, and order processes. Become a trusted guide for helping clients find the right routines and feel confident in their choices.





Feedback Loop: Capture customer insights and feedback through support interactions and proactively share them with product and operations teams to inform continuous improvement.





Required Qualifications

Strong verbal and written communication skills.

Ability to empathize and connect with a diverse range of clients.

Organized, detail-oriented, and capable of multitasking efficiently.

Proactive problem-solver with a positive attitude.



Previous experience in customer service or client-facing roles is a plus.

Must have Shopify Experience

Experience with Gorgias and similar ticketing systems is required

Compensation & Benefits

Competitive monthly salary of $400.

bonuses up to $160/4 weeks

A collaborative, high-energy work culture.

Opportunities for skill-building and career growth.







Our Culture & Values

At our agency, we’re fast, collaborative, and laser-focused on results. We believe in:

Excellence over Perfection: Done is better than perfect but we never settle for anything less than great work.

Open Communication: Feedback is a tool for growth, not a weapon.

Integrity Always: We act with transparency, honesty, and trust every step of the way.

We thrive on a proactive, honest, and performance-driven environment and we’re looking for people who do too!



Application Process

If you’re a service-minded professional who’s passionate about people and thrives in a fast-paced setting, we’d love to hear from you. Please fill out the form below:

skyandsol-careers.replit.app/





We’re excited to explore the possibility of working together!

title: DM Sales + Lead Nurturing Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
Let me be real with you upfront, this role is not for everyone.



If you've never worked in fitness or coaching sales, if you've never booked a high-ticket client through a DM conversation, if you need someone to hold your hand through every shift...this isn't your job.



But if you're the person who already knows how to read a lead, hold a conversation with a clear goal, and move someone from "just curious" to booked call without being pushy or robotic? Keep reading.



We're a fast-moving, women-led coaching business and we need someone who is sharp, emotionally intelligent, and genuinely good at converting warm leads into calls. Not copy-pasting scripts. Actually connecting. Actually closing.



What you'll be doing:



Daily outreach and lead nurture across Instagram and
 
, qualifying leads and booking them onto sales calls, maintaining CRM and lead tracking, following up with leads who've gone cold, and reporting back on what's working and what's not. We move fast. We expect you to keep up.



What you need to bring:



At minimum 1 year of experience in a similar role  fitness or coaching industry preferred. A real understanding of consumer psychology and value-based selling. Strong written communication and the emotional intelligence to know when to push and when to pull back. And a proactive mindset. You shouldn't be waiting to be told what to do.



What this is:



A contractor role with real growth potential inside a business that is scaling fast and takes culture seriously. We have high standards. We have a no-excuses environment. And we reward people who show up and perform.

/share/726daf5774d044c5b150b2c0b06428a4

title: Virtual Assistant & Administrative Operations
description:
ABOUT DRAX SOCIAL



DRAX Social is a full-service social media production agency. We build strategy, execute full production, handle editing, manage social media channels, run influencer partnerships, and help scale businesses across platforms. We are a fast-moving, creative-first team that operates at the intersection of brand storytelling and data-driven content strategy.



We are growing and we need an organized, proactive Admin VA who can hold down the operational backbone of the agency while supporting both our Social Media Manager and our Founder directly. This is not a passive role — we need someone who anticipates needs, closes gaps, and keeps things moving without being asked twice.



ROLE OVERVIEW



The Admin VA sits at the center of DRAX's day-to-day operations. You will support project management, handle scheduling and coordination, manage administrative tasks, assist with financial organization, and serve as a personal assistant to Alex (Founder and Lead Creative Ops). You will work closely with the Social Media Manager and will be a key connector across the team, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced creative environment, loves systems and organization, communicates clearly and professionally, and genuinely enjoys making things run smoothly behind the scenes.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Accounting & Budget Support

Maintain and update agency budgets and budget trackers in Google Sheets or Excel

Build and organize spreadsheets for project expenses, vendor costs, and shoot budgets

Help plan and forecast budgets for photo and video productions (shoots, equipment, talent, locations)

Track invoices, payments received, and outstanding balances

Draft and send invoicing
s to clients on behalf of the team

Organize receipts, expense records, and financial documents in Google Drive

Flag overages, payment gaps, or financial inconsistencies to the appropriate tea
mber



Planning & Scheduling Coordination

Schedule and confirm Zoo
etings, calls, and internal syncs across the team

Make appointments and manage calendar logistics for Alex and the Social Media Manager

Send booking confirmations to cast and crew for all production shoots

Send
 confirmations and scheduling communications for podcast guests

Create and organize project folders in Google Drive and 
  according to DRAX naming conventions

Set up project management tasks and timelines in applicable tools 

Document & Asset Creation

Create and format editing docs, revision trackers, and feedback sheets

Build strategy docs, content idea documents, and creative briefs from notes or direction given

Format and organize shot lists for photo and video productions

Draft SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) and process documentation as directed

Prepare client-facing documents such as proposals, onboarding packets, or reports

Maintain document templates and ensure all docs follow DRAX brand standards



Personal VA Support (Alex / Founder)

Manage Alex's
 inbox: triage, flag priority messages, draft responses, and organize threads

Help Alex prioritize her daily task list and keep her focused on the highest-impact work

Send Alex and the Social Media Manager daily reminders, task updates, and priority check-ins

Proactively identify gaps in the schedule, workflow, or project pipeline and flag them before they become problems

Research vendors, tools, services, or candidates as needed and compile findings into summaries

Handle miscellaneous personal tasks and errands that can be completed remotely



Client & Influencer Operations Support

Assist with influencer outreach tracking, follow-ups, and communication logs

Maintain a running contact database for clients, vendors, talent, and partners

Support client onboarding coordination including contract tracking and welcome communications

Monitor and flag client deliverable deadlines to ensure the team stays ahead of schedule

Help prepare client reports or performance recaps as directed by the Social Media Manager



General Agency Administration

Monitor and route incoming messages across business
 and DMs to the right tea
mbers

Maintain an organized Google Drive and 
 with consistent folder structures and file naming

Research and compile industry news, competitor insights, or platform updates when requested

Keep team SOPs up to date and accessible

Take notes during team calls and distribute action items afterward



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Organized

You build systems naturally. Folders, trackers, and checklists are your love language.

Proactive

You notice what's missing before you're asked. You close gaps and give direction without waiting to be told.

Clear Communicator

You write professional
s, format clean documents, and communicate with confidence.

Tech-Savvy

Comfortable with Google Workspace, Zoom, project management tools, and social platforms.

Discreet

You handle sensitive information about clients, finances, and personal tasks with full confidentiality.

Adaptable

Creative agencies move fast and change often. You pivot with ease and stay calm under pressure.

Detail-Oriented

Typos, missed deadlines, and sloppy formatting are not in your DNA.





TOOLS & PLATFORMS



Familiarity with the following is a plus. Training on agency-specific tools and workflows will be provided.



Communication

Gmail, Slack, Zoom

Project Mgmt

Trello, Hey Orca

File Management

Google Drive, Google Docs, Sheets, Slides

Social Platforms

Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn,
, X 
)

Scheduling

Zoom Calendar, Google Calendar, Hey Orca or similar scheduling tools

Design / Docs

Canva (basic), Google Slides, Microsoft Office

Finance

Google Sheets (required), QuickBooks or Wave (a plus)





GROWTH POTENTIAL



DRAX Social is actively scaling. As we grow across more clients, platforms, and brands, this role has the potential to expand into a full-time Operations Manager or Executive Assistant position. The right person will grow with us.



We invest in people who show up consistently, communicate transparently, and take ownership of their lane. If that is you, there is a long-term home here.



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered for this role, please submit the following:



A brief introduction telling us who you are and why this role is a fit for you

Examples of systems, folders, trackers, or documents you have built or managed

Your availability and preferred working hours

Any tools or platforms you are proficient in

Your rate or compensation expectations

title: Web Developer, Blog Writer, & SEO Position For Personal Injury Law Firm
description:
We are seeking a dependable skilled web developer with a strong background in SEO to enhance our website's performance and visibility.

Candidates should be familiar with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and SEO tools. If you have a passion for creating user-friendly websites and optimizing them for search engines, we would love to hear from you.



Website Developer: WordPress, Page Creation & Blogging, SEO, Google Optimization & Website Performance Enhancement

Seeking a skilled web developer with expertise in WordPress, blogging, SEO, and Google tools optimization. This role focuses on optimizing website performance, enhancing search engine visibility, and improving user experience. Ideal candidates should have experience with technical SEO, Google Analytics GA4 integration, Google My Business management, and content creation.

Mobile Performance:

Optimize for mobile performance and ensure compliance with Google Core Web Vitals.

Implement strategies to improve mobile rankings and user experience.



SEO and Keyword Strategy:

Optimize the site for commercial and transactional keywords to rank in the top 20 search engine results.

Google Tools Integration:

Content and Blogging:

Implement keyword strategies and align content with the firm’s goals.



Requirements:



Proven experience in WordPress development, SEO, and technical website optimization.

Expertise in Google tools, including Analytics (GA4), Search Console, and Google My Business.

Strong knowledge of blogging, content marketing, and backlink building.

Familiarity with Core Web Vitals, mobile-first optimization, and local SEO strategies.

Strong communication skills, detail-oriented, and results-driven approach.

title: Ecommerce Financial Controller / Accounting Manager
description:
ABOUT US

SWOOC Games is one of the fastest-growing game companies in the US since 2015 doing seven figures in sales annually, being featured on the INC 5000 twice. We are seeking a dedicated and committed candidate that is looking for a long-term position with room to grow with our company.



For a candidate with the drive to learn and grow, this truly is an amazing opportunity. We are recruiting, training & building a team for long and successful careers with our company. Our ideal candidate is committed to growing together with us, and in turn, we will give you all the tools and support to succeed and grow in your career.



Are you passionate about:

• Think Big

• Learn & Grow

• Focus on the Future

• Be Fueled by Innovation

• Take Ownership

• Be Respectful



Then, you've found the right place! Our team values these qualities and seeks individuals who are enthusiastic about making an impact.



This opportunity may not be the perfect match if:

• You're just looking for any gig to try

• Adapting to USA working hours doesn't fit your schedule

• Providing exceptional customer service isn't your strong suit



For more information, visit us at 



ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the SWOOC Games Team, your mission is to ensure accurate and timely financial reporting, effective budget management, compliance with accounting standards, and support for strategic financial planning. This role involves leading the accounting team, optimizing financial processes, and contributing to the overall financial health and growth of the organization.



• Oversee all accounting operations, including Payroll, Billing, A/R, A/P, GL, Cost Accounting, Inventory Accounting, and Revenue Recognition.

• Coordinate and direct the preparation of the budget and financial forecasts and report variances.

• Track projected costs and actual costs, determine underlying causes of differences, solve issues, and continuously improve • projections.

• Prepare and publish timely monthly financial statements.

• Manage and report the P&L on a product level (50+ products).

• Support and oversee month-end and year-end close processes to meet deadlines.

• Ensure quality control over financial transactions and financial reporting.

• Manage and comply with local, state, and federal government reporting requirements and tax filings.

• Develop and document business processes and accounting policies to maintain and strengthen internal controls.

• Manage financial aspects of eCommerce platforms, including payment gateways and sales tax compliance.

• Additional controller duties as necessary.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal candidate must have the following knowledge, skills, and work experience.



• Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (Master's or CPA preferred).

• 5+ years of experience in accounting or financial management roles.

• Proven experience in financial reporting and budgeting.

• Experience managing a team and leading accounting operations.

• Familiarity with compliance and regulatory requirements.

• Experience in the eCommerce industry and understanding of its financial dynamics (Amazon experience is a plus).

• Key Competencies: Organization & Planning, Strategic Thinking/Visioning, Business Acumen, Results-Oriented, Leadership & Management Skills, Detail-Oriented, High Standards, Honesty & Integrity

• Master level of QuickBooks Online

• Advanced proficiency in MS Excel & Google Sheets, including Pivot Tables, Macros, and advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, SUMIFS)

• Proficiency in Google Workspace, MS Word, and PowerPoint.

• Experience with project management and collaboration tools such as Asana and Slack.

• Familiarity with eCommerce platforms and financial tools (e.g., Amazon, Shopify).

• Strong internet & Tech Savvy.



HOURS OF WORK PER WEEK

• 40 hours per week. Monday - Friday, 08:00am to 01:00pm EST.

• The remainder of the hours can be completed on a flexible schedule.



SALARY & BENEFITS

• Salary is $15-20/hour (DOE)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• 11 Paid Public Holidays

• Quarterly Bonus

• Annual Salary Increment

• Annual Christmas Bonus

• Patent Bonus

• HMO after 3 months (for Full-time Tea
mbers only)

• Education Assistance Program

• SWOOC Tea
mber Discounts

• Referral Bonus Program

• Work/Life Balance

• Salary depends on experience. Paid biweekly via Wise.



If you are a great fit for this position, please reply to this job post with your updated resume. Applications without an updated resume will not be considered.



SWOOC Games team is looking forward to meeting you!

title: Social Media Manager for Women’s Boutique (Graphic Design Skills a Plus)

I’m looking for a creative, brand-aware Social Media Manager to help bring the brand to life through content, storytelling, and visual consistency. This role is ideal for someone with strong visual taste who understands how to create content that feels natural, elevated, and not overly salesy. This role is more focused on content, brand voice, and aesthetic consistency than advanced graphic design.

 marketing

• Strong portfolio of social media content

• Strong visual taste and understanding of branding 

• Good written English

Nice to Have (but not required):

• Experience creating simple marketing graphics



Important:

Taste and aesthetic are extremely important for this role. We are looking for someone who understands modern, elevated, fashion-forward branding and can create content that feels natural, not overly promotional.



To Apply:

• Opportunity for raises based on performance and reliability

title: Podcast/Video Editor
description:
PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR CV/Resume, COVER LETTER AND LINKS TO YOUR PORTFOLIO SHOWCASING LONG-FORM YOUTUBE VIDEOS AND PODCAST EDITING WORK.



Are you a creative editor with a passion for long-form storytelling and the ability to bring content to life through video and audio editing? We're looking for a talented Podcast/YouTube Editor to help us grow our YouTube channel and launch a successful podcast. This role focuses primarily on producing high-quality long-form content, with short-form social media content (IG, TikTok,
) as a secondary priority.

- Enhance audio quality and clarity for podcasts, balancing sound levels and removing background noise.

- Collaborate on developing episode structures, intros, outros, and overlays to maintain viewer engagement.

- Create short-form content (reels, clips, highlights) from long-form content for IG, TikTok, and
 as a secondary focus.

- Use AI-driven tools to streamline the editing process and elevate production quality.

- Manage video editing with tools like CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, and others.

- Leverage GoHighLevel (GHL) for scheduling and distributing long-form content across YouTube and podcast platforms (note: this role focuses on creative, not technical funnel building).

- Design eye-catching thumbnails, banners, and visual elements to drive engagement on YouTube and podcast platforms.

- Stay updated with trends in YouTube and podcasting to continually innovate and improve content strategies.



Skills & Experience:

- Proficiency in editing software such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and Adobe Audition for audio editing.

- Experience using AI-powered tools like Descript, Adobe Sensei, Lumen5, Otter.ai, and Runway to enhance video and audio content.

- Strong understanding of YouTube algorithms, SEO, and audience retention strategies for long-form content.

- Ability to repurpose long-form content into engaging short-form clips for social media (secondary focus).

- Proficiency in creating compelling visuals, including thumbnails and video overlays, to maximize YouTube click-through rates.

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) for scheduling and managing content distribution.

- Excellent attention to detail, with the ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in YouTube video and podcast editing, with a portfolio showcasing long-form content.

- Strong creative vision and storytelling skills to keep audiences engaged.

- Experience working with GoHighLevel (GHL) for content distribution (creative side only, no technical funnel building).

- Ability to work independently and take ownership of projects from start to finish.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills.



Bonus Skills:

- Knowledge of YouTube SEO and analytics to optimize video performance.

- Experience with podcast distribution platforms like Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and Google Podcasts.

- Familiarity with social media trends and strategies for cross-promotion of long-form content.



Technical Requirements:

- Operating System: Windows 10 or 11, 8GB RAM

- Internet Speed: Minimum 25 Mbps download/upload speed for smooth communication and task execution.

- Proficient in Google Workspace (Docs, Meet, Chat, Sheets, Drive, etc.), Trello for project management, Loom for recordings, and GoHighLevel (Preferred)

- Technical Troubleshooting: Comfort with troubleshooting common technical issues related to software or internet connectivity to ensure minimal disruptions.

title: Amazon Brand Expert
description:
ABOUT US:



At Seller Candy, our vision is to give balance, certainty & peace of mind to e-commerce entrepreneurs. We’re a value-driven company that believes our team is as important as our customers. Our core values are; Own-it, Authenticity, Determination, Expertise, and Impact through Growth.



To accomplish our vision we remove the daily friction experienced by e-commerce entrepreneurs by handling their Amazon account issues and support cases with agency-level expertise and best practices in a fun and collaborative environment.



Seller Candy bridges the gap from “online seller” to business owner. We enable millions of dollars in revenue and free hundreds of people from their jobs, transforming them into confident entrepreneurs accomplishing their dreams.



Seller Candy is in an exciting phase of growth so join us and imagine yourself being part of changing lives!





WHAT YOU WILL DO:

We’re looking for passionate, detailed problem solvers who can’t rest until things are right. As an Amazon Operations & Account Expert, you’ll be connecting to and impacting the lives of our customers and their families.

Lead client communications for all assigned Amazon brands/accounts.

Share updates and results with the client on an ongoing basis.

Manage Listings via:

1. The Seller Central backend

2. Communication with Seller Support

Change, update, manipulate, and build listings for Amazon US and EU using tools such as flat files.

Liaise with Seller Support on behalf of clients.

1. Clients will specify their desired outcome, and we should continually push Seller Support to achieve that result.

2. We never send our clients back a canned reply, we continue to open cases,
, and call via phone until we have a resolution.

3. “Google it” to solve problems

When difficult or new problems arise (they always will!) you must be able to google it, search through Amazon forums, and generally find the information available to guide your decisions or to give the client best practices advice. THIS IS ESSENTIAL.

Seller Central Basics:

1. Inventory management, shipping plans, sales reports, feedback removal, and more. All of the basic tasks are typically performed inside Seller Central.

Create Raving Fans

When you speak to our clients, and when you service their accounts, we will give WHITE GLOVE SERVICE. That means you always maintain a positive attitude, give the client clean, concise instructions, go above and beyond their task if possible, and proactively give them information if available. We aim to surprise our clients with more than they expect!





WHAT YOU NEED:

- You should have at least a year of hands-on experience in the Amazon space and be comfortable navigating Seller Central like a pro.

- Extreme self-motivation and problem-solving skills

- A heart-felt, emotional connection to customer happiness

- A natural aversion to letting problems be left unsolved.

- Attention to detail and prompt reporting adherence to deadlines

- More than 1 year working in Amazon Industry

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Proficient in using computers to effectively solve and research resolutions online and communicate efficiently.

Able to work CST/EST, depending on the needs of the company.





WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU:



Full-time work

High-paying job compared to similar roles

Offer starts at $615 per month (Plus benefits, paid leave, bonuses, and more as described below)

Performance bonuses upon regularization

HMO upon regularization

Leave benefits upon regularization

Growth potential within the company

The amazing opportunity to join a fast-growing company who is just as focused on their team as they are on their customers.



To apply, please answer these questions when you reply to us:

• 1. Which of your previous roles involved working with Amazon Seller Central?

• 2. On a scale of 1 to 10 (with 10 being the highest), how would you rate your proficiency with Seller Central?

• 3. Could you elaborate on the specific tasks and responsibilities you’ve managed that required using Seller Central?



***No need to use a lot of OLJ points, 1 is enough. Thank you!

title: Sales & Purchasing Coordinator – Industrial Distribution (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Start your application with the word PIPELINE — this tells us you read the full post.



Universal Flow Controls (UFC) is a US-based industrial supplier specializing in pipes, valves, fittings (PVF), and structural steel products. We source material from US manufacturers and distributors and sell to industrial buyers across North America and Mexico. Visit us at 
.



We are a lean, high-output team based in Laredo, Texas — we operate on Airtable, Odoo, and Google Workspace and are actively building AI-powered workflows to scale how we operate commercially.



The opportunity



We are looking for a motivated, detail-oriented professional to join our commercial team in a role that sits at the intersection of sales coordination, industrial sourcing, and emerging AI-assisted workflows.



You will manage customer quote requests from intake through purchase — handling RFQs for pipe, valves, fittings, and a wide range of miscellaneous industrial products. You will use our AI tools to identify the right suppliers for each product category, and you will independently research and source quotes for less common or one-off product requests outside standard categories.



We will teach you everything — our quoting methodology, supplier network, product fundamentals, and how to navigate edge cases. What we cannot teach is the willingness to learn. We need someone who is genuinely curious, comfortable with evolving technology, and motivated to grow into a role being actively shaped by the systems we are building.



This is a ground-floor opportunity to be part of building something — not just executing a static job description.



Your workflow: Quote ? Sourcing ? Purchase ? Handoff

1. Quoting

-Acknowledge every incoming RFQ within 2 business hours

-Qualify each opportunity: product specifications, quantities, delivery requirements, country of origin restrictions, certifications, and approved manufacturer requirements

-Use our AI sourcing tools to identify the right suppliers, supplemented by your own research for miscellaneous or non-standard items

-Build the customer quote with pricing and terms applied, and enter it into Airtable with all required fields — customer price, supplier cost, logistics estimate, margin, and delivery terms

-Quotes are structured strategically; margin recommendations are applied case by case based on product type, customer relationship, competitive context, and deal complexity

-Target quote delivery within 48 hours of receiving supplier pricing



2. Follow-up & close

-Execute a structured follow-up sequence on every quote sent — no quote should expire without a documented outcome

-Every quote is closed out with a final status: Won, Lost (with reason), or Expired

-Airtable tracks every stage, every outcome, every interaction across the pipeline

-When a quote is won, transition immediately to sourcing



3. Sourcing & negotiation

-Engage suppliers to secure the best combination of price, lead time, and payment terms

-Use our AI tools alongside your own outreach to compare supplier options and structure the best possible buy for each order

-Negotiate professionally — both on unit cost and on terms. Strong purchasing is as important as winning the sale

-Document your sourcing process: suppliers compared, terms negotiated, supplier selected, and rationale



4. Purchase order

-Issue the purchase order to the selected supplier with complete requirements: specifications, quantities, restrictions, required delivery date, payment terms, and certifications

-Enter all PO details into Odoo accurately and completely

-Confirm receipt with the supplier and ensure an Order Acknowledgement is expected

-Hand off to the logistics team with full context: PO details, expected ready date, and any open items



How AI will work with you

We are actively developing AI agents across every step of this workflow. 

You will:

-Use AI tools to assist in supplier identification and quote structuring

-Use AI-assisted follow-up to manage the quote pipeline at scale

-Participate in refining these tools — your day-to-day experience in the workflow is direct input into how we improve them

-You are not expected to build these tools. You are expected to use them, understand them, and help us make them more effective over time.



How we measure performance

-Quote turnaround: under 48 hours from pricing received  

-Follow-up completion: 100% of quotes receive a full follow-up sequence with a documented outcome

-Sourcing speed: PO issued within 2 business days of order confirmation

-Margin performance: quoted margin vs. actual margin at time of purchase, tracked per deal



Payment terms achieved: tracked per supplier per deal

-PO accuracy: zero POs issued with incomplete specifications, missing restrictions, or unclear delivery requirements



What we are looking for

-Excellent written English — you will be communicating directly with US industrial buyers and suppliers on behalf of the company

-Eagerness to learn — you do not need to know PVF today, but you need to want to master it

-Genuine comfort with technology and an open attitude toward AI tools still being developed and refined

-A professional negotiation approach — suppliers expect to be engaged on price and terms, and you should be comfortable doing that with confidence

-Strong attention to detail — in industrial products, specifications, grades, and certifications are not interchangeable

-Organizational discipline — you will be managing multiple open quotes and active orders simultaneously

-Spanish comprehension is a plus — a portion of our supplier and customer base operates in Spanish, particularly across the US-Mexico corridor



What this role does not cover  

-Freight, logistics, and customs coordination — a dedicated team takes over once the PO is confirmed  

-Customer invoicing and collections

-Warehouse and receiving operations



Schedule



-This is a full-time remote position (40 hours/week, Monday–Friday). Work is mostly asynchronous and deadline-driven. We require 2–3 hours of daily overlap with US Central Time — you will not be required to work a full graveyard shift. We will agree on a schedule that works for both sides during onboarding.



Communication & expectations

-Daily async updates on pipeline and open items. Weekly performance and pipeline review. We expect tea
mbers to work through problems independently before escalating — bring what you tried, not just what went wrong.



What we offer

-13th-month pay (December bonus equal to one month's salary)

-$40/month HMO/health allowance

-10 vacation days + 5 sick days + major Philippine public holidays

-Full training on our systems, tools, products, and quoting methodology — we will teach you the PVF industry from the ground up

-Annual performance review with raise potential



A long-term, permanent role on a small team where your work is seen and valued



How to apply

-Begin your message with the word PIPELINE, then answer these two questions:  

-Describe your experience with any ERP system or purchasing/quoting workflow (Odoo, SAP, Oracle, or similar)  

-Tell us about a time you caught an error before it reached a customer or supplier.

-Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.

title: PPC Campaign Manager | Home Services | U.S. Market
description:
Company: Nexta Talent (on behalf of client)

Location: Remote (international candidates welcome)

Type: Part-Time Contractor

Compensation: $800–$1,200/month flat retainer



---



About the Role



We're looking for a sharp, data-driven PPC Campaign Manager to take full ownership of paid search campaigns for home service businesses across US localities. You'll manage, optimize, and build Google Ads campaigns with small budgets ($1,000–$3,000/month per campaign) that need to deliver real leads — not vanity metrics.



This is a part-time engagement with a defined scope: 5 active client campaigns that need consistent, strategic management. The right person treats every dollar of ad spend like it's their own money.



---



What You'll Do



- Manage and optimize 5 existing Google Ads campaigns for home service clients across multiple US markets

- Weekly bid management, keyword optimization, negative keyword refinement, and ad copy testing

- Deliver monthly performance reports with clear lead attribution and ROI analysis

- Monitor landing page performance and provide conversion rate optimization recommendations

- Manage budget allocation and pacing across all campaigns

- Develop PPC strategy tailored to local/home service businesses, including geo-targeting and Local Service Ads

- Quarterly strategy reviews with recommendations for scaling

- Set up and manage new campaigns as client accounts are onboarded



---



What You'll Work With



- Google Ads (Search, Local Service Ads, Display)

- Google Analytics 4 / Google Tag Manager

- Landing page builders (Unbounce, Instapage, or similar)

- Lead tracking platforms (CallRail, WhatConverts)

- Reporting and analytics tools



---



Required Qualifications



- 3+ years managing Google Ads campaigns, specifically for local/home service businesses

- Proven track record optimizing campaigns with small budgets ($1K–$5K/month)

- Strong understanding of local search, geo-targeting, and Local Service Ads

- Experience with lead attribution and conversion tracking — actual leads and cost-per-lead, not just clicks

- Proficiency with Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager

- Ability to produce clear, actionable monthly reports that connect ad spend to business outcomes

- Responsive communication (Slack/email within 1 business day)

- Self-motivated, works independently with minimal oversight



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience with CallRail, WhatConverts, or similar lead tracking platforms

- Landing page optimization / CRO experience

- Google Ads certification

- Experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Familiarity with home service verticals (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, landscaping, etc.)



---



Engagement Terms



- Compensation: $800–$1,200/month flat retainer (based on experience)

- Hours: 30-40 hours/month

- Trial Period: 60 days — mutual evaluation; either party may end the engagement at any time

- Payment: USD, monthly

- Communication: Slack and



---



How to Apply



Submit your application at applynexta.online with:



1. A cover letter describing a time you turned around an underperforming PPC campaign for a local service business (be specific with numbers)

2. Your LinkedIn profile

3. Portfolio or examples of PPC work (optional but recommended)



Only applications submitted through applynexta.online will be considered.



Qualified candidates will complete a paid practical assessment (a mock Google Ads audit) before the interview stage.

title: Part-Time Steel Estimator  Miscellaneous & Structural Steel
description:
Part-Time Steel Estimator



Miscellaneous & Structural Steel



About the Role



We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Steel Estimator with strong experience in miscellaneous and structural steel fabrication. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys working with precision, and can confidently manage multiple estimating projects.



This is a part-time opportunity, perfect for an experienced estimator looking for flexible work while contributing to high-impact projects.



Job Title



Part-Time Miscellaneous Steel Estimator



Core Responsibilities

Analyze blueprints, specifications, and project documents to determine labor, material, and timeline requirements

Prepare detailed cost estimates for miscellaneous and structural steel (e.g., stairs, railings, tanks, hoppers, chutes)

Develop scopes of work, bid packages, and value-engineered solutions

Manage drawing reviews and submittals from internal review through fabrication release

Coordinate with vendors and subcontractors to ensure complete and competitive pricing

Maintain and improve estimating tools, databases, and documentation

Support proposal development and business growth initiatives

Required Qualifications & Skills

Minimum 5 years of experience in miscellaneous steel fabrication estimating

Proficiency in Tekla EPM, Bluebeam or Adobe, and Microsoft Excel/Word

Strong knowledge of industry standards (AISC, AWS, NOMMA, AESS, SSPC)

Excellent organizational and time management skills

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple estimates and deadlines simultaneously

Preferred / Bonus Skills

Experience working with complex or custom steel fabrication projects

Background in value engineering and cost optimization strategies

Strong collaboration skills with cross-functional teams and vendors

Work Schedule

Part-Time (hours and schedule to be discussed based on project needs)

Flexible working arrangement depending on workload

Why This Role Matters



This position plays a critical role in ensuring accurate project costing and competitive bids. Your expertise will directly impact project success, profitability, and overall business growth.



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit the following:



Updated resume

A 60–90 second self-introduction video sharing your experience and why you are a great fit for this role

Samples of previous work (e.g., takeoffs, estimates, bid packages — please remove or redact confidential information)



Only valid applications submitted within 48–72 hours of this posting will be entertained.

title: Assistant Project Manager / Project Coordinator
description:
About the Role



We’re a fast-growing digital marketing agency seeking an organized, proactive Assistant Project Manager / Project Coordinator to join our team. In this role, you’ll support senior project managers on active client campaigns across SEO, PPC, social media, content marketing, and web development.



This position is designed for career growth: you’ll start by assisting on projects, learning agency processes, and gradually taking on more responsibility. With demonstrated performance, you’ll advance to managing your own client portfolio as a full Project Manager.



What You’ll Do



Project Coordination & Support

- Assist the Director PM in managing digital campaigns, timelines, and deliverables.

- Track tasks, deadlines, and milestones to keep projects running smoothly. 

- Coordinate with internal teams (SEO, PPC, social media, content, design, development) to ensure campaigns are executed efficiently.

- Take meeting notes, document action items, and follow up on tasks.

Client Communication

- Attend client calls and meetings to support the Director PM by taking notes and learn best practices.

- Help prepare presentation decks

- Build strong internal and external relationships by maintaining clear, professional communication.

 Process Improvement

- Suggest workflow enhancements to improve campaign efficiency and client experience.

- Learn and maintain agency project management systems and tools.

Professional Growth

- Receive mentorship from senior project managers to develop campaign strategy and client management skills.

- Gradually take ownership of smaller campaigns and clients.

- Transition into a full Project Manager role with your own client portfolio over time.



What We’re Looking For



- 1–3 years of experience in project coordination, client services, or marketing (marketing agency experience required).

- Strong organizational skills and ability to multitask

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Proactive problem-solver who can take initiative in a fast-paced environment.

- Familiarity with project management and reporting tools (Asana, ClickUp, HubSpot, Basecamp, Google Analytics, etc.).

- Interest in digital marketing and eagerness to learn across multiple channels.



What You’ll Gain



- Clear growth path to Project Manager with your own client portfolio.

- Hands-on experience managing campaigns across SEO, PPC, social media,
, and web projects.

- Mentorship and training in client communication, strategy, and campaign management.

- Exposure to multiple industries and digital marketing channels.

- A collaborative, supportive agency environment with opportunities for career advancement.



How We Invest in Employee Success:



- No one is set up to fail. Every new client is vetted to ensure they understand our services, what we are going to do for them, and that success is clearly defined and achievable (in most cases, our strategists create the strategy and timeline to outline in the contract for the client to sign off on!)

- Continued training for employees sponsored by The Ad Firm (courses, seminars, tools, etc)

- Weekly account reviews, business growth meetings, personal development meetings, and more!

- Dedication to employee growth and development, promotions, and hiring internally.

- Competitive pay



Other incentives



- Paid Sick Leave

- 8 Paid Holidays

- Matching 401K

- 2 weeks PTO

- Health Insurance

- Dental Insurance

- Training and Education (Including Conferences All Over The Globe!)

- Company Supplied Snacks & Drinks

- Company Lunches & Happy Hour

- Company-Wide Incentives For Hitting Goals



We do not monitor
s on this website. Please go to 
= to send your application.

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant – Wholesale / Brand Name Reselling
description:
We run a wholesale/brand name reselling operation on Amazon and need an all-around VA who knows the resale game .You should already understand how to work with existing ASINs, source from authorized distributors, and keep our operation running smoothly.

What You'll Be Doing:

Product Sourcing & Research — Scan wholesale price lists, compare against Amazon prices, check ROI/profit margins, verify sales rank, and flag winning products. Use tools like Keepa or similar to analyze deals.

Listing & Buy Box Management — Match products to existing ASINs, submit offers, manage pricing and repricing strategy, and monitor Buy Box performance. Handle any listing issues like suppressed or stranded inventory.

Inventory & Reordering — Track stock levels, place reorders with vendors/distributors before we run out, coordinate FBA inbound shipments (create shipment plans, generate labels), and follow up on open POs.

Vendor & Supplier Communication — Call and

Account Health & Compliance — Monitor IP complaints, handle policy violations, submit appeals, open Seller Support cases, request brand ungating/category approvals, and resolve ASIN-level issues.

Reporting — Pull sales and inventory reports, track margins, flag slow movers, and keep our spreadsheets and trackers updated.
